1Chronicles2:1 Jakobo o be a na le barwa ba ba latelago: Rubene, Simeone, Lefi, Juda, Isakara, Sebulone," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dane, Josefa, Benjamene, Naftali, Gade le Asere." 
1Chronicles2:3 Juda o be a na le barwa ba bahlano. Mosadi wa gagwe wa Mokanana, Bateshua, o ile a mmelegela barwa ba bararo, e lego Ere, Onane le Shela. Morwa wa gagwe wa leitšibolo, Ere, e be e le yo mobe moo Morena a ilego a ba a mmolaya. Ngwetši wa gagwe, Tamare, a mmelegela Peretse le Serage." 
1Chronicles2:4  
1Chronicles2:5 Barwa ba Peretse e bile Hetserone le Hamule. 
1Chronicles2:6 Serage o be a na le barwa ba ba fetšago seatla, e lego Simri, Ethane, Hemane, Kalkolo le Darda." 
1Chronicles2:7 Morwa wa Simri e be e le Karmi, mme Akane, morwa wa Karmi, o ile a hlolela setšhaba sa Israele mathata ka go ipha thoto ye e bego e gafetšwe go fedišwa." 
1Chronicles2:8 Morwa wa Ethane e be e le Asaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Barwa ba Hetserone e be e le Jeragmeele, Ramo le Kalebe." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ramo e ile ya ba tatagoAminadaba, Aminadaba a belega Nagshone, moetapele wa kgoro ya Juda, yena a tswala" 
1Chronicles2:11 Salmone, Salmone a belega Boase," 
1Chronicles2:12 Boase ya ba tatagoObede, mme Obede a tswala Isai." 
1Chronicles2:13 Isai o be a na le barwa ba ba šupago. Bona šeba ka go hlatlamana ga bona: Eliaba, Abinadaba, Shama," 
1Chronicles2:14 Netanele, Radai," 
1Chronicles2:15 Otseme le Dafida. 
1Chronicles2:16 Dikgaetšedi tša bona e be e le Tseruya le Abigaile. Barwa ba Tseruya e be e le Abishai, Joaba le Asahele." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaile o ile a nyalwa ke Jetere, setlogolo sa Ishmaele, mme ba ba le morwa yo a ilego a rewa leina la Amasa." 
1Chronicles2:18 Morwa wa Hetserone, Kalebe, o ile a nyala Asuba, gomme a ba le morwedi yo leina la gagwe e ilego ya ba Jeriote. Jeriote yena a ba le barwa ba bararo, e lego Jeshere, Shobabe le Ardone." 
1Chronicles2:19 Asuba o ile a hwa, gomme Kalebe a nyala Efrata, mme ba ba le morwa yo leina la gagwe e ilego ya ba Hure." 
1Chronicles2:20 Morwa wa Hure e bile Uri, gomme setlogolo sa gagwe ya ba Betsaliele." 
1Chronicles2:21 Ge Hetserone a na le mengwaga ye masome a a selelago o ile a nyala morwedi wa Makire, tatagoGileade. Ba ba le morwa yo leina la gagwe e ilego ya ba Segube," 
1Chronicles2:22 mme Segube a ba le morwa yo a ilego a bitšwa Jaire. Jaire o be a na le metse ye masome a mabedi a metšo ye meraro nageng ya Gileade. 
1Chronicles2:23 Eupša mmušo wa Geshure le wa Aramo e ile ya thopa metse ye masome a a selelago moo, gotee le metse ya Jaire le ya Kenate, le metse ye e lego kgauswi. Batho ka moka ba ba bego ba dula moo e be e le ditlogolo tša Makire, tatagoGileade." 
1Chronicles2:24 Ka morago ga lehu la Hetserone, Kalebe, morwa wa gagwe, a nyala Efrata, mosadi wa tatagwe. Ba ba le morwa yo leina la gagwe e bilego Ashure, yo a ilego a hloma motse wa Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Barwa ba Jeragmeele, morwa wa pele wa Hetserone, le mosadi wa gagwe, Ahia, e be e le Ramo, wa leitšibolo, le Buna le Orene le Otseme." 
1Chronicles2:26 Barwa ba Ramo e be e le Maatse, Jamine le Ekere. Jeragmeele o be a na le mosadi yo mongwe yo a bitšwago Atara, gomme ba ba le morwa, Onamo." 
1Chronicles2:27  
1Chronicles2:28 Barwa ba Onamo e be e le Shamai le Jada, gomme ba Shamai ya ba Nadaba le Abishure." 
1Chronicles2:29 Abishure o ile a nyala mosadi yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Abigaile, gomme yena a mmelegela Agbane le Molide." 
1Chronicles2:30 Barwa ba Nadaba, morwarragoAbishure, e be e le Selede le Apaime, eupša Selede a hwa a se na bana." 
1Chronicles2:31 Apaime e bile tatagoJishi, Jishi ya ba tatagoSheshane, mme Sheshane ya ba tatagoAglai." 
1Chronicles2:32 Barwa ba Jada, morwarragoShamai, e be e le Jetere le Jonathane, eupša Jetere a hwa a se na le bana." 
1Chronicles2:33 Barwa ba Jonathane e be e le Pelete le Sasa. Bao ka moka e be e le ditlogolo tša Jeragmeele. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshane o be a se ne barwa, a na le barwedi fela. O be a na le mohlanka wa Moegepeta yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Jareha." 
1Chronicles2:35 A mo nyadiša morwedi yo mongwe wa gagwe. Ba ba le morwa yo leina la gagwe e bilego Athai. 
1Chronicles2:36 Go tloga go Athai go fihla go Elishama moloko o latelana ka mokgwa wo: Athai, Nathane, Sabade," 
1Chronicles2:37 Eflale, Obede," 
1Chronicles2:38 Jehu, Asaria," 
1Chronicles2:39 Heletse, Elasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 Sismai, Shalume," 
1Chronicles2:41 Jekamia le Elishama. 
1Chronicles2:42 Morwa wa leitšibolo wa Kalebe, morwarragoJeragmeele, o be a bitšwa Mesha. Mesha e bile tatagoSife, yo e ilego ya ba tatagoMaresha, yo e bilego tatagoHebrone." 
1Chronicles2:43 Barwa ba Hebrone e be e le Korage, Tapuage, Rekeme le Shema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema e bile tatagoRahamo le rakgolo wa Jorokoamo. Rekeme, morwarragoShema, e bile tatagoShamai," 
1Chronicles2:45 yo e ilego ya ba tatagoMaone, yo e bilego tatagoBethe-Tsure." 
1Chronicles2:46 Kalebe o be a na le motlabo yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Efa, gomme yena a mmelegela Harane, Motsa le Gasese. Harane le yena a ba le morwa yo a bitšwago Gasese." 
1Chronicles2:47 Monna yo mongwe yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Jadai o be a na le barwa ba ba latelago: Regeme, Jotamo, Geshane, Pelete, Efa le Shaafo." 
1Chronicles2:48 Kalebe o be a na le motlabo wo mongwe, Maaka, yo a ilego a belega Shebere le Tirihana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Ka morago a ba le barwa ba bangwe, e lego Shaafo, yo a hlomilego motse wa Madimana, le Sheba, yo a hlomilego motse wa Makabena le wa Gibea. Le gona Kalebe o ile a ba le morwedi yo a ilego a bitšwa Aksa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Ba ba latelago le bona ke ditlogolo tša Kalebe: Hure e be e le leitšibolo la Kalebe le mosadi wa gagwe, Efrata. Morwa wa Hure, Shobale, o ile a hloma Kiriate-Jearime," 
1Chronicles2:51 morwa wa gagwe wa bobedi, Salmone, a hloma Betlelehema, gomme morwa wa gagwe wa boraro, Harefe, a hloma Bethe-Gadere." 
1Chronicles2:52 Shobale, mohlomi wa Kiriate-Jearime, e bile rakgolokhukhu wa batho ba Reaya, le wa karolo ya badudi ba Manahate," 
1Chronicles2:53 le wa dikgorwana tše di latelago tše di bego di dula Kiriate-Jearime: Bajetere, Bapute, Bashumate le Bamishra. Batho ba motse wa Tsora le wa Eshtaolo e be e le ba dikgorwana tše." 
1Chronicles2:54 Salmone, mohlomi wa Betlelehema, e bile rakgolokhukhu wa batho ba Netofa, ba Atharote-Bethe-Joaba le ba Tsora, ba e bego e le karolo ya Bamanahate." 
1Chronicles2:55 Ba dikgorwana tše di latelago tša bakgoni ba go ngwala le go ngwalolla ba be ba dula motseng wa Jabetse: Batirate, Bashimate le Basukate. E be e le Bakene ba ba hlomilego Bethe-Rekabe, ba etšwa Hamate." 
1Chronicles3:1 Bana bao Dafida a ba belegetšwego ge a be a sa le Hebrone šeba ka go hlatlamana ga bona: Amnone, yo mmagwe e bego e le Ahinoamo wa Jesriele Daniele, yo mmagwe e bego e le Abigaile wa Karmele Absalomo, yo mmagwe e bego e le Maaka, morwedi wa Kgoši Talmai wa Geshure Adonia, yo mmagwe e bego e le Hagite Shefatia, yo mmagwe e bego e le Abitala Jitreamo, yo mmagwe e bego e le Egla" 
1Chronicles3:1 Bana bao Dafida a ba belegetšwego ge a be a sa le Hebrone šeba ka go hlatlamana ga bona: Amnone, yo mmagwe e bego e le Ahinoamo wa Jesriele Daniele, yo mmagwe e bego e le Abigaile wa Karmele Absalomo, yo mmagwe e bego e le Maaka, morwedi wa Kgoši Talmai wa Geshure Adonia, yo mmagwe e bego e le Hagite Shefatia, yo mmagwe e bego e le Abitala Jitreamo, yo mmagwe e bego e le Egla" 
1Chronicles3:2  
1Chronicles3:3  
1Chronicles3:4 Ba ba selelago bao ba belegetšwe Hebrone nakong ya mengwaga ye e šupago le dikgwedi tše di selelago yeo ka yona Dafida a bušitšego a le fao. Ge a le Jerusalema o bušitše mengwaga ye masome a mararo a metšo ye meraro," 
1Chronicles3:5 gomme moo a belegelwa barwa ba bantši. Mosadi wa gagwe, Batseba, morwedi wa Amiele, o ile a mmelegela barwa ba bane, e lego Shima, Shobabe, Nathane le Solomone." 
1Chronicles3:6 Dafida o bile le barwa ba bangwe ba senyane, e lego Jibehara, Elishua, Elpelete," 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga, Nefege, Jafia," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elishama, Eliada le Elifelete." 
1Chronicles3:9 Ntle le barwa bao ka moka, Dafida o be a na le barwa ba bangwe le metlabo ya gagwe. Le gona o be a na le morwedi yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Tamare." 
1Chronicles3:10 Lešika la Kgoši Solomone le kgokagane ka mokgwa wo: Solomone, Rehabeamo, Abia, Asa, Joshafate," 
1Chronicles3:11 Joramo, Ahasia, Joase," 
1Chronicles3:12 Amatsia, Usia, Jotamo," 
1Chronicles3:13 Ahase, Hiskia, Manase," 
1Chronicles3:14 Amone le Josia. 
1Chronicles3:15 Josia o be a na le barwa ba bane, e lego Johanane, Joyakime, Tsedekia le Joahase." 
1Chronicles3:16 Joyakime o bile le barwa ba babedi, e lego Joyakine le Tsedekia." 
1Chronicles3:17 Šedi ditlogolo tša Kgoši Joyakine yo a ilego a thopša ke Bababilonia. Barwa ba Joyakine e be e le Sealtiele," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malkiramo, Pedaya, Shenatsare, Jekamia, Hoshama le Nedabia." 
1Chronicles3:19 Barwa ba Pedaya e be e le Serubabele le Shimi. Barwa ba Serubabele e be e le Meshulamo le Hanania, Shelomite e le kgaitšedi ya bona." 
1Chronicles3:20 O bile le barwa ba bangwe ba bahlano, e lego Hashuba, Ohele, Berekia, Hasadia le Jushabe-Hesede." 
1Chronicles3:21 Barwa ba Hanania e be e le Pelatia le Jeshaya. Jeshaya e bile tatagoRefaya, yo e bilego tatagoArnane, Arnane tatagoObadia, Obadia tatagoShekania." 
1Chronicles3:22 Shekania o bile le barwa ba ba selelago, e lego Shemaya, Hatushe, Jigale, Bariage, Nearia le Shafate." 
1Chronicles3:23 Nearia o bile le barwa ba bararo, e lego Elioenai, Hiskia le Asrikamo." 
1Chronicles3:24 Elioenai o bile le barwa ba ba šupago, e lego Hodabia, Eliashibe, Pelaya, Akube, Johanane, Delaya le Anani." 
1Chronicles4:1 Ditlogolo tše dingwe tša Juda šedi: Peretse, Hetserone, Karmi, Hure le Shobale." 
1Chronicles4:2 Shobale e bile tatagoReaya, yo e bilego tatagoJahate; Jahate ya ba tatagoAhumai le Lahade, borakgolokhukhu ba batho ba ba bego ba dula Tsora." 
1Chronicles4:3 Hure e be e le morwa wa leitšibolo wa Efrata, gomme ditlogolo tša gagwe di hlomile motse wa Betlelehema. Hure o bile le barwa ba bararo, e lego Ethamo, Penuele le Esere. Barwa ba Ethamo e be e le Jesriele, Jishma le Jidbashe, Hatseleleponi e le kgaitšedi ya bona. Penuele o ile a hloma motse wa Gedoro, Etsere yena a hloma wa Husha." 
1Chronicles4:4  
1Chronicles4:5 Ashure, yo a hlomilego motse wa Tekoa, o be a na le basadi ba babedi, e lego Hela le Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara a mmelegela barwa ba: Ahusamo, Hefere, Temni le Ahashtari." 
1Chronicles4:7 Hela a belega barwa ba: Tserete, Jitsara le Etnane." 
1Chronicles4:8 Kotse e be e le tatagoAnube le Tsobeba, e bile e le rakgolokhukhu wa dikgorwana tše di tšwilego go Aharehele, morwa wa Harumo." 
1Chronicles4:9 Go be go na le monna yo a bitšwago Jabetse, yo a bego a hlomphega kudu lapeng labo. Mmagwe o be a mo reetše leina la Jabetse, ka gobane go belegwa ga gagwe go be go bile bohloko kudu." 
1Chronicles4:10 Eupša Jabetse a rapela Modimo wa Israele a re: “Ntšhegofatše kudu, Modimo, gomme o nkokeletše naga. Baa le nna mme o ntšhireletše go tšohle tše mpe gore di se ke tša nkweša bohloko.” Gomme Modimo a mo fa se a se kgopetšego." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelube, morwarragoShuha, o be a na le morwa, Mehire. Mehire ya ba tatagoEshtone," 
1Chronicles4:12 yo a ilego a ba le barwa ba: Bethe-Rafa, Paseage le Tehina. Tehina e bile mohlomi wa motse wa Nahashe. Ditlogolo tša batho ba di be di dula Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Barwa ba Kenase e be e le Otniele le Seraya. Otniele ya ba tatagoHatate le Meonotai. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonotai e bile tatagoOfra. Seraya a tswala Joaba, yo e bilego mohlodi wa mešomo ya Moeding wa Batsebamediro-ya-diatla, fao batho ba ntshe e bego e le bašomi ba bokgoni." 
1Chronicles4:15 Kalebe, morwa wa Jefune, o be a na le barwa ba bararo, e lego Iru, Ela le Naama. Gomme Ela ya ba tatagoKenase." 
1Chronicles4:16 Barwa ba Jehalelele e be e le Sife, Sifa, Tiria le Asariele." 
1Chronicles4:17 Esra o be a na le barwa ba: Jetere, Merede, Efere le Jalone. Merede a nyala Bitia, morwedi wa kgoši ya Egepeta, gomme ba ba le morwedi, Miriamo, le barwa ba maina a bona e bego e le Shamai le Jishbage. Jishbage o ile a hloma motse wa Eshtemoa. Merede le yena a nyala mosadi wa kgoro ya Juda, gomme ba ba le barwa ba: Jerede, yo a hlomilego motse wa Gedoro, Hebere, mohlomi wa motse wa Soko, le Jekutiele, mohlomi wa motse wa Sanoage." 
1Chronicles4:18  
1Chronicles4:19 Hodia o ile a nyala kgaetšedi ya Nahamo. Ditlogolo tša bona tša tswala ba kgorwana ya Garme ba ba bego ba dula motseng wa Keila, le ba kgorwana ya Maaka ba ba bego ba dula motseng wa Eshtemoa." 
1Chronicles4:20 Shimone o be a na le barwa ba: Amnone, Rina, Benhanane le Tilone. Barwa ba Jishi e be e le Sohete le Bensohete." 
1Chronicles4:21 Shela e be e le yo mongwe wa barwa ba Juda. Ditlogolo tša gagwe tše dingwe e be e le Ere, yo a hlomilego motse wa Leka, le Lada, mohlomi wa motse wa Maresha, le ba kgorwana ya balogi ba mašela, ba ba bego ba dula motseng wa Bethe-Ashbea," 
1Chronicles4:22 le Jokime le batho ba ba bego ba dula motseng wa Koseba, le Joase le Sarafo, bao ba ilego ba nyala basadi ba Bamoaba mme ba boela Betlelehema. Ditaba tše di bolelwago mo ke tša kgale kudu." 
1Chronicles4:23 E be e le babopi ba dipitša ba go šomela kgoši, mme ba dula motseng wa Netaime le wa Gedera." 
1Chronicles4:24 Simeone o be a na le barwa ba: Nemuele, Jamine, Jaribe, Serage le Shaulo." 
1Chronicles4:25 Morwa wa Shaulo e be e le Shalume, setlogolo sa gagwe e le Mibisamo, mme setlogolwana sa gagwe e le Mishma." 
1Chronicles4:26 Go tloga go Mishma lešika le be le theogela go Hamuele, Sakure le Shimi." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimi o be a na le barwa ba lesome le ba ba selelago le barwedi ba ba selelago, eupša bomorwarragwe ba be ba se na le bana ba bantši, gomme kgoro ya Simeone ya se ke ya gola bjalo ka ya Juda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Go ba go fihla mehleng ya Kgoši Dafida ditlogolo tša Simeone di be di dula metseng ye e latelago: Beresheba, Molada, Hatsare-Shuale," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bilha, Etseme, Eltolade," 
1Chronicles4:30 Bethuele, Horma, Tsikelage," 
1Chronicles4:31 Bethe-Markabote, Hatsare-Susime, Bethe-Biri le Shaharaime." 
1Chronicles4:32 Ba be ba dula le metseng ye mengwe ye mehlano: Ethamo, Aine, Rimone, Togene le Ashane," 
1Chronicles4:33 le metseng ye e bapilego le yona, go ba go yo fihla motseng wa Baale. Ao ke mananeo a ba a ngwadilego a malapa a bona le a mafelo ao ba ilego ba dula go ona." 
1Chronicles4:34 Banna ba ba latelago e be e le mantona a dikgorwana tša bona: Meshobabe, Jamleke, Josha, morwa wa Amatsia, Joele, Jehu, morwa wa Joshibia, Joshibia morwa wa Seraya, Seraya morwa wa Asiele, Elioenai, Jaakoba, Jeshohaya, Asaya, Adiele, Jesimiele, Benaya, Sisa, morwa wa Shifi, Shifi morwa wa Alone, Alone morwa wa Jedaya, Jedaya morwa wa Shimri, Shimri morwa wa Shemaya Ka gobane malapa a bona a ile a gola kudu," 
1Chronicles4:34 Banna ba ba latelago e be e le mantona a dikgorwana tša bona: Meshobabe, Jamleke, Josha, morwa wa Amatsia, Joele, Jehu, morwa wa Joshibia, Joshibia morwa wa Seraya, Seraya morwa wa Asiele, Elioenai, Jaakoba, Jeshohaya, Asaya, Adiele, Jesimiele, Benaya, Sisa, morwa wa Shifi, Shifi morwa wa Alone, Alone morwa wa Jedaya, Jedaya morwa wa Shimri, Shimri morwa wa Shemaya Ka gobane malapa a bona a ile a gola kudu," 
1Chronicles4:35  
1Chronicles4:36  
1Chronicles4:37  
1Chronicles4:38  
1Chronicles4:39 ba ile ba ikala ba ba ba nyaka go fihla Gerare, mme ba fudiša dihuswane tša bona ka thoko ya bohlabela bja moedi wo motse woo o lego ka go wona." 
1Chronicles4:40 Ba hwetša mafulo a mabotse a go nona moo nageng yeo e bego e ikadile, e letše. Batho bao ba bego ba kile ba dula moo e be e le Bahamo." 
1Chronicles4:41 Mehleng ya Kgoši Hiskia wa Juda banna ba go bolelwago ka bona fa ba ile ba ya Gerare mme moo ba hlasela mešaša ya Bahamo, ba hlasela le Bameune ba ba bego ba dula moo. Ba ba fediša taa, mme ba dulela moo sa ruri ka gobane go be go na le phulo ya dihuswane tša bona." 
1Chronicles4:42 Ba bangwe ba makgolo a a fetšago seatla ba kgoro ya Simeone ba ile ba ya nageng ya dithaba ya Edomo. Ba be ba etilwe pele ke Pelatia, Nearia, Refaya le Usiele, barwa ba Jishi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Moo ba bolaya mašaledi a Baamaleke, gomme ba dula ntshe go tloga ka nako yeo." 
1Chronicles5:1 Tše ke ditlogolo tša Rubene, yena wa mathomo go barwa ba Jakobo. Ka ge a be a kile a robala le yo mongwe wa metlabo ya tatagwe, o ile a se ke a ngwadišwa gore ke morwa wa mathomo, gomme ditokelo tša morwa wa leitšibolo tša fiwa barwa ba Josefa." 
1Chronicles5:2 Le ge go le bjalo e bile kgoro ya Juda ye e ilego ya ba le maatla go feta tše dingwe mme ya tswala mmuši wa dikgoro ka moka, eupša ditokelo tša morwa wa leitšibolo tšona ya ba tša Josefa." 
1Chronicles5:3 Rubene, yena yo mogolo go barwa ba Jakobo, o bile le barwa ba: Enoko, Palu, Hetserone le Karmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Šedi ditlogolo tša Joele go tloga molokong wo mongwe go iša go ye mengwe ye e o latelago: Shemaya, Gogo, Shimi, Mika, Reaya, Baale le Beera. Kgoši ya Asiria, Tiglate-Pilesere, o ile a iša Beera, moetapele wa kgoro, bothopša." 
1Chronicles5:4 Šedi ditlogolo tša Joele go tloga molokong wo mongwe go iša go ye mengwe ye e o latelago: Shemaya, Gogo, Shimi, Mika, Reaya, Baale le Beera. Kgoši ya Asiria, Tiglate-Pilesere, o ile a iša Beera, moetapele wa kgoro, bothopša." 
1Chronicles5:5  
1Chronicles5:6  
1Chronicles5:7 Mananeo ao a ngwadilwego a malapa a lokologanya mantona a dikgorwana mo kgorong ya Rubene ka tsela ye: Jeiele, Sakaria" 
1Chronicles5:8 le Bela, morwa wa Asase. Asase yo e be e le morwa wa Shema, wa kgorwana ya Joele. Ba kgorwana ye ba be ba dula Aroere le go tloga moo go fihla Nebo le Baale-Meone." 
1Chronicles5:8 le Bela, morwa wa Asase. Asase yo e be e le morwa wa Shema, wa kgorwana ya Joele. Ba kgorwana ye ba be ba dula Aroere le go tloga moo go fihla Nebo le Baale-Meone." 
1Chronicles5:9 Ba be ba na le mehlape ye mentši nageng ya Gileade, ka gona ba dula seleteng sa go ya ka bohlabela go fihla mathomong a lešoka le le yago nokeng ya Yufratese." 
1Chronicles5:10 Mehleng ya Kgoši Saulo kgoro ya Rubene e ile ya hlasela Bahagare, ya ba fenya, gomme ya thopa karolo ya ka bohlabela ka moka ya naga ya bona kua Gileade." 
1Chronicles5:11 Kgoro ya Gade e be e dula ka leboa la kgoro ya Rubene, nageng ya Bashane. Naga ya bona e be e fihla le Salka." 
1Chronicles5:12 Joele e bile yena mohlodi wa kgorwana ya ntshe ye kgolo, gomme Shafamo a hlola ye e e latelago. Janai le Shafate e bile bahlodi ba dikgorwana tše dingwe kua Bashane." 
1Chronicles5:12 Joele e bile yena mohlodi wa kgorwana ya ntshe ye kgolo, gomme Shafamo a hlola ye e e latelago. Janai le Shafate e bile bahlodi ba dikgorwana tše dingwe kua Bashane." 
1Chronicles5:13 Ba bangwe ba kgoro ye e be e le ba dikgorwana tše di šupago tše: Mikaele, Meshulamo, Sheba, Jorai, Jakane, Sia le Ebere." 
1Chronicles5:14 E be e le ditlogolo tša Abihaile, morwa wa Huri, yoo borakgolokhukhu ba gagwe ba bego ba latelana ka mokgwa wo: Jaroage, Gileade, Mikaele, Jeshishai, Jagdo, Buse." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi, morwa wa Abdiele, e be e le setlogolo sa Guni, gomme e le ntona ya dikgorwana tšeo." 
1Chronicles5:16 Ba be ba dula nageng ya Gileade le ya Bashane, le metseng ya Bashane, le nageng ka moka ya mafulo ya Sharone." 
1Chronicles5:17 Ditaba tše ka moka di ngwadilwe mehleng ya Kgoši Jotamo wa Juda le ya Kgoši Jerobeamo wa Israele. 
1Chronicles5:18 Kgorong ya Rubene le ya Gade le seripakgorong sa Manase sa ka bohlabela go be go na le bahlabani ba 44 760 ba ba hlahlilwego gabotse go šomiša dikotse, ditšhoša le mesebe, mme ba loketše ntwa." 
1Chronicles5:19 Ba ile ba tšwa dira go yo lwa le kgoro ya Bahagare le ya Jeture le ya Nafishe le ya Nodaba. 
1Chronicles5:20 Ba bota Modimo mme ba mo rapela gore a ba thuše, gomme a kwa dithapelo tša bona mme a gafela Bahagare le ba seboka sa bona diatleng tša bona." 
1Chronicles5:21 Ba ba thopela dikamela tše dikete tše masome a mahlano, le dihuswane tše makgolo a mabedi le tše masome a mahlano, le dipokolo tše dikete tše pedi, le mathopša a dikete tše lekgolo." 
1Chronicles5:22 Ba bolaya manaba a mantši ka gobane ntwa yeo e be e lwewa ka thato ya Modimo. Gomme ba dula nageng yeo go ba go fihla ka nako ya bothopša. 
1Chronicles5:23 Batho ba seripakgoro sa Manase sa ka bohlabela ba ile ba dula nageng ya Bashane go yo fihla Baale-Hermone le Senire le thabeng ya Hermone, gomme setšhaba sa bona sa oketšega." 
1Chronicles5:24 Ba ba latelago e be e le mantona a dikgorwana tša bona: Efere, Jishi, Eliele, Asriele, Jeremia, Hodabia le Jagdiele. Ka moka ga bona e be e le bahlabani ba bogale, baetapele ba go tuma ba dikgorwana tša bona." 
1Chronicles5:25 Eupša batho bao ba ile ba se ke ba botegela Modimo wa borakgolokhukhu ba bona, gomme ba mo furalela ba khunamela medimo ya ditšhaba tše Modimo a di lelekilego nageng ge bona ba goroga." 
1Chronicles5:26 Ka gona Modimo a hlohleletša Kgoši Pule wa Asiria, yo a bego a tsebja le ka la Tiglate-Pilesere, gore a hlasele naga ya bona. A iša ba kgoro ya Rubene le ya Gade le ba seripakgoro sa Manase sa ka bohlabela bothopša, gomme a ba dudišetša sa ruri kua Halage, Habore le Hara, le nokeng ya Gosane." 
1Chronicles6:1 Lefi o be a na le barwa ba: Gershone, Kehate le Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Kehate o be a na le barwa ba: Amramo, Jitsara, Hebrone le Usiele." 
1Chronicles6:3 Amramo o bile le barwa ba: Arone le Moshe, le morwedi o tee, Miriamo. Arone o bile le barwa ba: Nadaba, Abihu, Eleasara le Ithamara." 
1Chronicles6:4 Ditlogolo tša Eleasara go tloga molokong wo mongwe go iša go ye mengwe ye e o latelago šedi: Finease, Abishua," 
1Chronicles6:5 Buki, Usi," 
1Chronicles6:6 Seragia, Merayote," 
1Chronicles6:7 Amaria, Ahitube,"

1Chronicles6:9 Asaria, Johanane," 
1Chronicles6:10 Asaria, yo a bego a šoma ka Tempeleng ye Kgoši Solomone a bego a e agile Jerusalema," 
1Chronicles6:11 Amaria, Ahitube," 
1Chronicles6:12 Tsadoko, Shalume," 
1Chronicles6:13 Hilkia, Asaria," 
1Chronicles6:14 Seraya, Jotsadaka." 
1Chronicles6:15 Kgoši Nebukadnesare o ile a thopa Jotsadaka gotee le batho ba bangwe ba Juda le ba Jerusalema bao Morena a ilego a ba romela bothopša. 
1Chronicles6:16 Lefi o be a na le barwa ba: Gershone, Kehate le Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Gershone e bile tatagoLibni le Shimi; 
1Chronicles6:18 Kehate ya ba tatagoAmramo, Jitsara, Hebrone le Usiele," 
1Chronicles6:19 gomme Merari ya ba tatagoMagli le Mushi. 
1Chronicles6:20 Ditlogolo tša Gershone go tloga molokong wo mongwe go iša go ye mengwe ye e o latelago šedi: Libni, Jahate, Sima," 
1Chronicles6:21 Joage, Ido, Serage, Jeatrai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Tše ke ditlogolo tša Kehate go tloga molokong wo mongwe go iša go ye mengwe ye e o latelago: Aminadaba, Korage, Asire," 
1Chronicles6:23 Elkana, Abiasafo, Asire," 
1Chronicles6:24 Tahate, Uriele, Usia, Shaulo." 
1Chronicles6:25 Elkana o bile le barwa ba: Amasai le Ahimote. 
1Chronicles6:26 Ditlogolo tša Ahimote go tloga molokong wo mongwe go iša go ye mengwe ye e o latelago šedi: Elkana, Tsufe, Nahate," 
1Chronicles6:27 Eliaba, Jerohamo, Elkana." 
1Chronicles6:28 Samuele o be a na le barwa ba babedi: Joele, leitšibolo, le Abia, monnagwe." 
1Chronicles6:28 Samuele o be a na le barwa ba babedi: Joele, leitšibolo, le Abia, monnagwe." 
1Chronicles6:29 Tše ke ditlogolo tša Merari go tloga molokong wo mongwe go iša go ye e o latelago: Magli, Libni, Shimi, Usa," 
1Chronicles6:30 Shima, Hagia, Asaya." 
1Chronicles6:31 Ba ke banna ba Kgoši Dafida a ilego a ba bea bahlokomedi ba moopelo lefelong la tirelo kua Jerusalema ka morago ga ge Polokelo ya Kgwerano e seno išwa gona. 
1Chronicles6:32 Ba be ba šielana ka go tla mošomong Tenteng ya bodulo bja Morena pele ga ge Kgoši Solomone a aga Tempele. 
1Chronicles6:33 Ba malapa a bao ba bego ba swere mošomo wo ba be ba latelana ka mokgwa wo: Kgorwana ya Kehate: Hemane, moetapele wa sehlopha sa baopedi sa mathomo, e be e le morwa wa Joele. Lešika la gagwe le be le swaragane go fihlela go Jakobo ka tsela ye: Hemane, Joele, Samuele," 
1Chronicles6:33 Ba malapa a bao ba bego ba swere mošomo wo ba be ba latelana ka mokgwa wo: Kgorwana ya Kehate: Hemane, moetapele wa sehlopha sa baopedi sa mathomo, e be e le morwa wa Joele. Lešika la gagwe le be le swaragane go fihlela go Jakobo ka tsela ye: Hemane, Joele, Samuele," 
1Chronicles6:34 Elkana, Jerohamo, Eliele, Toage," 
1Chronicles6:35 Tsufe, Elkana, Mahate, Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 Elkana, Joele, Asaria, Sofonia," 
1Chronicles6:36 Elkana, Joele, Asaria, Sofonia," 
1Chronicles6:37 Tahate, Asire, Abiasafo, Korage," 
1Chronicles6:38 Jitsara, Kehate, Lefi, Jakobo." 
1Chronicles6:39 Asafo e be e le moetapele wa sehlopha sa bobedi sa baopedi. Lešika la gagwe le be le swaragane go fihlela go Lefi ka mokgwa wo: Asafo, Berekia, Shima," 
1Chronicles6:40 Mikaele, Maasea, Malkia," 
1Chronicles6:41 Etni, Serage, Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 Ethane, Sima, Shimi," 
1Chronicles6:43 Jahate, Gershone, Lefi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Ethane wa kgorwana ya Merari e be e le moetapele wa sehlopha sa boraro sa baopedi. Lešika la gagwe le be le swaragane go fihlela go Lefi ka mo go latelago: Ethane, Kishi, Abdi, Maluke," 
1Chronicles6:45 Hashabia, Amatsia, Hilkia," 
1Chronicles6:46 Amtsi, Bani, Shemere," 
1Chronicles6:47 Magli, Mushi, Merari, Lefi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Balefi ba gabobona ba ile ba fiwa mediro ye mengwe lefelong la tirelo. 
1Chronicles6:49 Arone le ditlogolo tša gagwe ba be ba tšhuma diorelo, le gona ba tšhuma dihlabelo aletareng. Ba be ba hlokometše tirelo ka moka ka Felong mo Gokgethwakgethwa, ba bile ba hlokometše go boelanya setšhaba sa Israele le Modimo. Ba be ba dira tšeo ka moka go ya ka moo Moshe, mohlanka wa Modimo, a bego a ba laetše ka gona." 
1Chronicles6:50 Lešika la ditlogolo tša Arone šele: Eleasara, Finease, Abishua," 
1Chronicles6:51 Buki, Usi, Seragia," 
1Chronicles6:52 Merayote, Amaria, Ahitube," 
1Chronicles6:53 Tsadoko, Ahimaatse." 
1Chronicles6:54 Naga ye e aroletšwego ditlogolo tša Arone tša kgorwana ya Kehate e bile karolo ya mathomo ya naga ye e abetšwego Balefi ka matengwa. 
1Chronicles6:55 Karolo yeo e be e akaretša Hebrone nageng ya Juda, le phulo go e dikologa." 
1Chronicles6:56 Eupša mašemo le metse ye e bego e le ya Hebrone di ile tša fiwa Kalebe, morwa wa Jefune." 
1Chronicles6:57 Metse ye e ilego ya fiwa ditlogolo tša Arone še: wa Hebrone, motse wa botšhabelo, wa Jatire, wa Libna, wa Eshtemoa, wa Holone, wa Debire, wa Ashane, le wa Bethe-Shemeshe, le phulo ya yona." 
1Chronicles6:58  
1Chronicles6:59  
1Chronicles6:60 Nageng ya Benjamene ba ile ba fiwa metse ye e latelago le phulo ya yona: Geba, Alemete le Anathote. Metse yeo ya bona yohle e be e le ye lesome le metšo ye meraro yeo ba malapa a bona ba bego ba ka dula go yona." 
1Chronicles6:61 Metse ye lesome nageng ya seripakgoro sa Manase sa ka bodikela e ile ya abelwa ba bangwe ba kgorwana ya Kehate ka matengwa, lapa ka lapa." 
1Chronicles6:62 Ba ile ba abela kgorwana ya Gershone, lapa ka lapa, metse ye lesome le metšo ye meraro nageng ya Isakara, le ya Asere, le ya Naftali, le ya seripakgoro sa Manase sa kua Bashane." 
1Chronicles6:63 Ka yona tsela yeo, metse ye lesome le metšo ye mebedi nageng ya Rubene, le ya Gade, le ya Sebulone ya abelwa kgorwana ya Merari, lapa ka lapa." 
1Chronicles6:64 Ka mokgwa woo setšhaba sa Israele sa abela Balefi metse, gammogo le phulo go dikologa metse yeo." 
1Chronicles6:65 Metse ya nageng ya Juda, le ya Simeone, le ya Benjamene ye e sa tšwago go balwa ka maina le yona e ile ya abja ka matengwa." 
1Chronicles6:66 Malapa a mangwe a kgorwana ya Kehate a ile a fiwa metse le phulo nageng ya Efraime," 
1Chronicles6:67 e lego motse wa Shekeme wa botšhabelo nageng ya dithaba ya Efraime, wa Gesere," 
1Chronicles6:68 wa Jokmeamo, wa Bethe-Horone," 
1Chronicles6:69 wa Ayalone, le wa Gate-Rimone." 
1Chronicles6:70 Nageng ya seripakgoro sa Manase sa ka bodikela ba fiwa motse wa Anere le wa Bileamo le phulo go dikologa metse yeo. 
1Chronicles6:71 Malapa a kgorwana ya Gershone a ile a abelwa metse ye le phulo ya yona go e dikologa: Nageng ya seripakgoro sa Manase sa ka bohlabela ba fiwa wa Golane kua Bashane, le wa Ashtarote." 
1Chronicles6:72 Nageng ya Isakara ba abelwa wa Kedeshe, wa Daberate," 
1Chronicles6:73 wa Ramote, le wa Ene-Ganime." 
1Chronicles6:74 Nageng ya Asere ba newa wa Mishale, wa Abdone," 
1Chronicles6:75 wa Hukoko, le wa Rehobo." 
1Chronicles6:76 Nageng ya Naftali ba fiwa wa Kedeshe kua Galilea, wa Hamone, le wa Kiriathaime." 
1Chronicles6:77 Malapa a mangwe a kgorwana ya Merari a ile a abelwa metse ye le phulo go e dikologa: Nageng ya Sebulone ba fiwa wa Rimone le wa Taboro. 
1Chronicles6:78 Nageng ya Rubene, ka bohlabela bja noka ya Jordane go lebana le Jeriko, ba abelwa wa Betsere molaleng, wa Jahatse," 
1Chronicles6:79 wa Kedemote, le wa Mefaate." 
1Chronicles6:80 Nageng ya Gade ba newa wa Ramote kua Gileade, wa Mahanaime," 
1Chronicles6:81 wa Heshbone, le wa Jasere." 
1Chronicles7:1 Isakara o be a na le barwa ba bane, e lego Tola, Pua, Jashube le Shimrone." 
1Chronicles7:2 Tola o bile le barwa ba: Usi, Refaya, Jeriele, Jagmai, Jibsamo le Shemuele. E be e le dihlogo tša malapa a kgorwana ya Tola, mme e le bahlabani ba bogale. Mehleng ya Kgoši Dafida ditlogolo tša bona e be e le tše 22 600." 
1Chronicles7:3 Morwa wa Usi e be e le Jisragia. Jisragia le barwa ba gagwe ba bane, Mikaele, Obadia, Joele le Jishia, ka moka e be e le dihlogo tša malapa." 
1Chronicles7:3 Morwa wa Usi e be e le Jisragia. Jisragia le barwa ba gagwe ba bane, Mikaele, Obadia, Joele le Jishia, ka moka e be e le dihlogo tša malapa." 
1Chronicles7:4 Ba ile ba ba le basadi ba bantši le bana mo e lego gore ditlogolo tša bona di ile tša ba le bahlabani ba 36 000. 
1Chronicles7:5 Mananeo a malapa ka moka a kgoro ya Isakara a be a na le bahlabani ba 87 000 ba bogale. 
1Chronicles7:6 Benjamene o be a na le barwa ba bararo, e lego Bela, Bekere le Jediaele." 
1Chronicles7:7 Bela o bile le barwa ba bahlano, e lego Etsebone, Usi, Usiele, Jerimote le Iri. Bona e bile dihlogo tša malapa kgorwaneng yeo, mme ka moka ga bona e be e le bahlabani ba bogale. Ditlogolo tša bona e be e le tše 22 034 mananeong a bona a a ngwadilwego." 
1Chronicles7:8 Bekere o be a na le barwa ba: Semira, Joase, Eliesere, Elioenai, Omri, Jeremote, Abia, Anathote le Alemete." 
1Chronicles7:9 Mananeo a a ngwadilwego a ditlogolo tša bona ka malapa a be a na le bahlabani ba bogale ba 20 200. 
1Chronicles7:10 Morwa wa Jediaele e be e le Bilhane, gomme Bilhane a ba le barwa ba: Jeushe, Benjamene, Ehude, Kenaana, Setane, Tarshishe le Ahishahara." 
1Chronicles7:11 Bona e be e le dihlogo tša malapa kgorwaneng yeo, gomme ka moka ga bona e le bahlabani ba bogale. Gare ga ditlogolo tša bona go be go na le banna ba 17 200 ba ba ka yago ntweng." 
1Chronicles7:12 Shupime le Hupime, barwa ba Iri, le bona e be e le ba kgorwana ye. Hushime e be e le morwa wa Dane." 
1Chronicles7:13 Naftali o be a na le barwa ba: Jagtsiele, Guni, Jetsere le Shalume. E be e le ditlogolo tša Bilha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Mosadi wa Manase o ile a mmelegela Asriele, gomme motlabo wa gagwe wa Moaramo yena a belega Makire. Makire e bile tatagoGileade." 
1Chronicles7:15 O ile a nyakela Hupime mosadi, a ba a nyakela le Shupime. Leina la kgaetšedi ya gagwe e be e le Maaka. Morwa wa bobedi wa Makire e bile Tselofohade, mme yena a ba le barwedi fela." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka, mosadi wa Makire, o ile a belega barwa ba maina a bona e bego e le Perese le Serese. Serese a ba le barwa ba: Ulamo le Rekeme." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulamo a ba le morwa yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Bedane. Tšeo ka moka ke ditlogolo tša Gileade, morwa wa Makire, setlogolo sa Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Kgaetšedi ya Gileade, Molekete, o ile a ba le barwa ba: Ishehode, Abiesere le Magla." 
1Chronicles7:19 Shemida o bile le barwa ba: Agiane, Shekeme, Likhi le Aniamo." 
1Chronicles7:20 Šedi ditlogolo tša Efraime go tloga molokong wo mongwe go iša go ye mengwe ye e o latelago: Shutelage, Berede, Tahate," 
1Chronicles7:21 Sabade le Shutelage. Efraime o bile le barwa ba bangwe ka ntle le Shutelage. Bona e be e le Esere le Elade bale ba go bolawa ge ba tlile go utswa dikgomo tša badudi ba mathomo ba Gathe. 
1Chronicles7:22 Tatagobona Efraime a ba ilela matšatši a mantši, gomme bomorwarragwe ba tla go mo homotša." 
1Chronicles7:23 A robala le mosadi wa gagwe gape, mme mosadi a ima, a ba le morwa. Ba mo rea leina la Beria ka baka la madimabe ao a ilego a wela lapa la bona." 
1Chronicles7:24 Efraime o be a na le morwedi yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Sheera. Yena o ile a aga motse wa Bethe-Horone ya ka Tletlolo le wa Bethe-Horone ya ka Tlase, le wa Usene-Sheera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Efraime a ba le morwa yo mongwe gape yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Refage, yo ditlogolo tša gagwe e bilego Reshefo, Telage, Tahane," 
1Chronicles7:26 Ladane, Amihude, Elishama," 
1Chronicles7:27 Nunu le Joshua. 
1Chronicles7:27 Nunu le Joshua. 
1Chronicles7:28 Naga ya bona ye ba bego ba dula go yona e be e akaretša Bethele le metse ya gona, go ya bohlabela go ba go yo fihla Naara, le bodikela go ba go yo fihla Gesere le metse ya gona. Le gona e be e akaretša motse wa Shekeme le wa Aya, le metse ye e bapilego le yona." 
1Chronicles7:29 Ditlogolo tša Manase di be di laola motse wa Bethe-Sheane, wa Taanake, wa Megido, le wa Doro, le metse ye e bapilego nayo. Yeo ke metse yeo ditlogolo tša Josefa, morwa wa Jakobo, di bego di dutše go yona." 
1Chronicles7:30 Asere o bile le barwa ba: Jimna, Jishba, Jishbi le Beria, le kgaetšedi ya bona, Serage." 
1Chronicles7:31 Barwa ba Beria e be e le Hebere le Malkiele. Malkiele o ile a hloma motse wa Birsaite. 
1Chronicles7:32 Hebere e bile tatagoJaflete le Shomere le Hotamo le Shuage, kgaetšedi ya bona." 
1Chronicles7:33 Jaflete o bile le barwa ba: Pasake, Bimhale le Ashbate." 
1Chronicles7:34 Shomere o ile a ba le barwa ba: Roga, Jehuba le Aramo." 
1Chronicles7:35 Hotamo, morwarragwe, o bile le barwa ba: Tsofage, Jimna, Sheleshe le Amale." 
1Chronicles7:36 Ditlogolo tša Tsofage e bile Suage, Harnefere, Shuale, Beri, Jimra," 
1Chronicles7:37 Betsere, Hode, Shama, Shilsha, Jitrane le Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Ditlogolo tša Jetere e bile Jefune, Pispa le Ara," 
1Chronicles7:39 mme tša Ula ya ba Arage, Haniele le Ritsia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Bao ka moka e bile ditlogolo tša Asere. E be e le dihlogo tša malapa, bagale ba ba hlaotšwego, le gona e le mantona a go tuma. Gare ga ditlogolo tša Asere tše di bego di ngwadišitšwe mananeong ao go be go na le banna ba dikete tše masome a mabedi le tše di selelago ba ba ka yago ntweng."

1Chronicles8:2 Noha le Rafa.

1Chronicles8:4 Abishua, Naamane, Ahoage," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, Shefufane le Huramo."
