Psalms137:3 Gona moo ke mo bathopi ba rena ba bego ba re re ba opelele sefela; bathopi bao ba rena ba re re ba thabiše, ba re: “Re opeleleng sefela sa Sione.”" 
Psalms137:4 Na re ka napa ra opela sefela sa Morena nageng e šele? 
Psalms137:5 Ge eba nka go lebala, wena Jerusalema, gona ke hwe letsogo la go ja." 
Psalms137:6 Leleme la ka le nkgomarele magalapa, ge eba nka go lebala, ke ra ge eba e se wena o nthabišago go feta tšohle." 
Psalms137:7 Morena, gopola Baedomo mola ba thopa Jerusalema ba re: “E kgerešeng! E kgerešeng go fihla ka metheo!”" 
Psalms137:8 Wena motse wa Babilone, o lebanwego ke go kgerešwa, go lehlogonolo yo a go lefetšago se o re dirilego sona." 
Psalms137:9 Go lehlogonolo yo a tlago go phamola masea a gago, a a pšhatlaganya leswikeng." 
Psalms138:1 Morena, ke go reta ka pelo yohle; ke go opelela ditumišo pele ga medimo." 
Psalms138:2 Ke khunama ke lebeletše Tempeleng ya gago ye kgethwa, ke go tumiša ka baka la leratorato la gago le go botega ga gago. Kholofetšo yela ya gago e feta le setumo sa gago." 
Psalms138:3 Ge ke be ke go llela o ile wa nkwa, wa ntiiša, wa mmaatlafatša." 
Psalms138:4 Dikgoši tšohle tša lefase di tla go tumiša, Morena, ge di ekwa dikholofetšo tša gago." 
Psalms138:5 Ba tla opelela ditiro tša gago ba re: “Letago la Morena ke le legolo ruri!” 
Psalms138:6 Le ge o phagame gakaaka banyatšegi o a ba šetša; baikgogomoši bona o ba tseba ba sa le kgole. 
Psalms138:7 Ge ke dikaneditšwe ke mathata, o a ntlhakodiša; ge ke galefetšwe ke manaba, o a ntšhireletša; o mphološa ka maatla a gago." 
Psalms138:8 Morena o tla mphethela tšohle. Morena, leratorato la gago ke la go ya go ile. Tše o di dirilego o se di hlokomologe." 
Psalms139:1 Morena, o ntekotše mme o a ntseba." 
Psalms139:2 O tseba tšohle tše ke di dirago; o tseba tša pelo ya ka o le kgole. 
Psalms139:3 O laola mesepelo ya ka le marobalo a ka; ditsela tša ka o di tseba gabotse. 
Psalms139:4 Le pele ga ge ke ahlama, Morena, o tseba ka botlalo se ke tlago se bolela." 
Psalms139:5 O ntikaneditše ka gohle; o mpontšha gore ke nna wa gago. 
Psalms139:6 Go kwešiša taba ye go a mpalela, go šita tlhaologanyo ya ka." 
Psalms139:7 Na nka go tšhabela kae? Ke kae mo nka go khutelago gona? 
Psalms139:8 Ge nka rotogela legodimong, ke yo hwetša o le gona; ge nka yo patlama bodulabahu, o tla be o le gona kua." 
Psalms139:9 Ge nka fofela kua bohlabatšatši, goba ka yo dula ka mafelelong a bodikelatšatši," 
Psalms139:10 le gona moo o tla ntlhahla ka seatla sa gago, o tla ntshwara ka seatla sa la go ja." 
Psalms139:11 Le ge nka re leswiswi le mpipe, goba seetša e be bošego go ntikologa," 
Psalms139:12 go wena leswiswi ga le fifale, le bošego bo taga bjalo ka mosegare – go wena leswiswi le swana le seetša." 
Psalms139:13 Ditho tša ka tšohle di hlodilwe ke wena; ke wena o di kgomagantšego ka popelong ya mma. 
Psalms139:14 Ke go reta ka ge o mpopile ka mo go makatšago gape go tlabago; ditiro tša gago di a makatša. Seo ke se ke se tsebago gabotse. 
Psalms139:15 Mola ke bopša ka sephiring, mola ditho tša ka di kgomaganywa ka hloko ka popelong ya mma, ga go na le le tee la marapo a ka le o bego o sa le bone." 
Psalms139:16 O mpone le pele ke belegwa. Matšatši ohle a ka a go phela a be a šetše a ngwadilwe ka pukung ya gago, go sešo gwa tšwelela le le tee la ona." 
Psalms139:17 Aowii, Modimo, tše o di naganago nna di a mpalela; ga se ka bontši!" 
Psalms139:18 Ge nka re ke a di bala, di feta dithorwana tša lešabašaba. Ge ke fetša, ke tla ikhwetša ke sa na le wena." 
Psalms139:19 Joo, Modimo, nke nkabe o bolaya bakgopo! Nke nkabe babolai ba ntlogela!" 
Psalms139:20 Ba bolela tše kgopo ka wena; ba bolela leina la gago ba sa le hlomphe. 
Psalms139:21 Mmalo, Morena, nka nama ka se hloye ba ba go hloilego? Nka nama ka se šišingwe ba ba go tsogelago maatla?" 
Psalms139:22 Ke ba hloile hloihloi, gobane le nna ke manaba a ka." 
Psalms139:23 Mphetleke, Modimo, o tsebe pelo ya ka; ntekole, o bone khuduego ka go nna." 
Psalms139:24 Ntebelele ge ke na le bobe, gomme o nkiše tseleng ya go sa felego." 
Psalms140:1 Morena, ntamolele go bakgopo, o mphepiše batho ba šiši." 
Psalms140:2 Ke ba ba akanyago tše mpe ka dipelong, ba ba hlolago diphapano ka mehla." 
Psalms140:3 Ba lootša maleme a bona a ba bjalo ka a dinoga; ka ganong ga bona go tšwa bohloko bja mokopa. Sela 
Psalms140:4 Morena, mphahlele bakgopo; ntamolele go batho ba šiši, ba ba lakanago go mphereketša." 
Psalms140:5 Baikgogomoši ba ntheile ka difu tša dithapo; ba ntheetše mereo tseleng, ba ntheile ka melaba. Sela" 
Psalms140:6 Nna ke botša Morena ke re: “Ke wena Modimo wa ka.” Morena, hle, o nkwe ge ke go kgopela." 
Psalms140:7 Morena, Mong wa ka, wena Mohlakodišitia wa ka, ke wena o ntšhireletšago ntweng." 
Psalms140:8 Morena, bakgopo o se ba dumelele tše ba di nyakago; maanomabeng a bona ba se atlege, e ka tla ya ba bona bafenyi. Sela" 
Psalms140:9 A ba boelwe ke bobe bjo ba mpolelago ka bjona. A ba welwe ke magala," 
Psalms140:10 ba lahlelwe ka mekoting ya leraga, moo ba ka se kgonego go tšwa." 
Psalms140:11 Raleleme o mo hlokiše bodulo nageng ye; rašiši a a welwe ke mašula ka go latelana. 
Psalms140:12 Nna ke tseba ge Morena a šetša gore mohlaki le mohloki ba direlwe ka toka. 
Psalms140:13 Baloki ba tla go tumiša e le ruri; bahlokabosodi ba tla phela ba na le wena. 
Psalms141:1 Morena, ke a go llela; hle, nanoga, o tle go nna; nkwe ge ke go llela." 
Psalms141:2 A thapelo ya ka e go kgahle go etša seorelo; ge ke phagamišitše matsogo a swane le sehlabelo sa mantšiboa. 
Psalms141:3 Morena, o se ntese ke bolela tše di sego tša swanela, goba ke bolela ka lephakuphaku." 
Psalms141:4 Ntote ke se rate go dira tše mpe, ka dira bošaedi ka boomo le badirakgopo; ke se je menyanyeng ya bona." 
Psalms141:5 Go otlwa le go kgalwa ke moloki ka lerato ga ke go gane; eupša go hlompšha ke bakgopo gona ke go gana nnako; ke tla no ba rapelela le ge ba ntira gampe. 
Psalms141:6 Mohla babuši ba bona ba thetheošwa malekelekeng, ke mohla ba tlago dumela gore ke boletše nnete." 
Psalms141:7 Marapo a bona a gašagane mojako wa bodulabahu, a swana le dinkgetlwana tša tšhilo ye e pšhatlaganego fase." 
Psalms141:8 Nnaena mahlo a ka a lebeletše wena, Morena, Mong wa ka; nna ke khuta ka wena, o se ntlogele ke ehwa." 
Psalms141:9 Ntšhireletše difung tše ba ntheilego ka tšona, melabeng ya bona badirakgopo bao." 
Psalms141:10 Bakgopo a ba tanywe ke melaba ya bona; ge e le nna ke iphetele sesolo. 
Psalms142:1 Ke llela Morena ke goeletša, ke re a nkgaugele." 
Psalms142:2 Ke mmegela dillo tša ka tšohle, ke mmotša mathata a ka." 
Psalms142:3 Ge ke šetše ke nolega moko, o tseba se ke swanetšego go se dira. Tseleng ye ke sepelago go yona, manaba a ka a ntheile ka sefu." 
Psalms142:4 Ge ke gadima ka thoko, ke bona go se monthuši; ga ke na botšhabelo, ga ke na montšhetši." 
Psalms142:5 Ke llela wena, Morena, ke re: “O botšhabelo bja ka. O wa ka, Morena, ke le mo lefaseng.”" 
Psalms142:6 Ela sello sa ka hloko, gobane ke feletšwe ke tshepo. Ntlhakodiše go bantlhomari, ka ge ba mpalela." 
Psalms142:7 O nntšhe ka kgolegong, gore ke tle ke go tumiše; ke mo baloki ba tlago go bokanela, ka ge o ntoketše." 
Psalms143:1 Morena, ekwa thapelo ya ka; ntheeletše ge ke go llela; o nkarabe ka ge o botega ebile o le yo botho." 
Psalms143:2 O se ntshekiše, nna, mohlanka wa gago, gobane mo pele ga gago ga go motho mohlokabosodi." 
Psalms143:3 Sera sa ka se ntlhomere se nkgatakela fase; se mphediša swiswing boka ba ba hwilego kgale. 
Psalms143:4 Ke nolegile moko, ebile ke šetše ke itlhobogile." 
Psalms143:5 Ke elelwa tša mehleng ya kgale, ke gopola ditiro tšohle tša gago; tše o kilego wa di dira ga ke di lebale." 
Psalms143:6 Ke phagamiša matsogo ke go rapela; ke go nyoretšwe boka naga e nyoretšwe meetse. 
Psalms143:7 Morena, akgofa o nthuše, ke go hlolosetše; se iphihlele nna, ka tla ka ba bjalo ka ba ba theogelago bodulabahu." 
Psalms143:8 Mo mosong o nkgopotše leratorato la gago, ka gobane nna ke botile wena. O mpontšhe tsela ye ke swanetšego go tšea ka yona, gobane ke go hlolosetše e le ruri." 
Psalms143:9 O ntlhakodiše manabeng a ka, ka ge nna ke khuta ka wena." 
Psalms143:10 O nthute go phetha thato ya gago, gobane ke wena Modimo wa ka. Moya wa gago o lokile; a ke sepetšwe ke wona tseleng ye e lokilego." 
Psalms143:11 O ntote ke phele, Morena, ka ge o le Morena wa lešoko, mme o ntlhakodiše tlaišegong ya ka ka botho bja gago." 
Psalms143:12 Ka ge o nthata ka leratorato la gago, o tloše manaba a ka tšatšing; bagateledi ba ka o ba fediše molokwanarite, ka gobane ke mohlanka wa gago." 
Psalms144:1 A go tumišwe Morena, yena setšhabelo sa ka, yena a nthutago go lwa ntwa, yena a ntlwaetšago go hlabana." 
Psalms144:2 Ke yena mošireletši wa ka le sebo sa ka; ke botšhabelo bja ka le mophološi wa ka; ke kotse ya ka, ke sefahlelo sa ka; o mpea mmuši wa ditšhaba." 
Psalms144:3 Morena, motho ke selomang, ge o bile o mo šetša; ke ra motho wa nama, ge o bile o mo ela hloko?" 
Psalms144:4 Gape motho ga se selo; nako ya gagwe e feta bjalo ka moriti. 
Psalms144:5 Morena, sekamiša legodimo, o theogele fase; kgwatha dithaba, di tupe muši." 
Psalms144:6 Gadimiša magadima, o šwalalanye manaba; betša mesebe ya gago, ba hlanole direthe." 
Psalms144:7 Otlolla diatla o le moo godimo, o nkinole bodibeng, o mphološe; ntlhakodiše dinaleng tša bašele," 
Psalms144:8 bona ba go dula ba bolela maaka, ba a bolela le ka go ikana." 
Psalms144:9 Modimo, a ke go opelele sefela se sefsa, ke go opelele ke letša harepa ya metato ye lesome," 
Psalms144:10 wena o kgontšhago magoši go fenya, wena Mohlakodiši wa Dafida, mohlanka wa gago. Mphološe go bakgopo ba ba nyakago go mpolaya; ntlhakodiše dinaleng tša bašele, bona ba go dula ba bolela maaka, ba a bolela le ka go ikana." 
Psalms144:11  
Psalms144:12 A barwa ba rena ba godišwe bjalo ka dimelana tše di nošetšwago; barwedi ba rena ba etše dikokwane tša dikhutlo tše di kgabišitšwego ka meseto, tše di thekgilego ntlo ya mošate." 
Psalms144:13 A matlolo a rena a tlale dijo tša mehutahuta, dihuswane tša rena di tswale ka diketekete kua mafulong a gaborena." 
Psalms144:14 A dikgomo tša rena di none, le rena re se hlaselwe ra išwa bothopša. A go hlokege sello mapatlelong a rena." 
Psalms144:15 Go lehlogonolo tšhaba se se šegofatšwago bjalo; go lehlogonolo tšhaba seo Morena e lego yena Modimo wa sona. 
Psalms145:1 Wena Modimo wa ka, wena Kgoši, a ke go tumiše, ke go rete go ya go ile." 
Psalms145:2 Ke tla go tumiša ka mehla; ke tla go godiša go ya go ile. 
Psalms145:3 Morena ke yo mogolo, a a retwe gagolo; bogolo bja gagwe ke phetatlhaologanyo." 
Psalms145:4 Meloko ka go hlatlamana e tla reta mediro ya gagwe, ya bega le ditiro tša gagwe tše maatla." 
Psalms145:5 Ba tla anega letago la gago le bogoši bja gago, le ditiro tša gago tše di makatšago." 
Psalms145:6 Ba tla anega maatla a gago ao ka ona o dirago ditiro tša go gakgamatša, gomme nna ke tla bega bogolo bja gago." 
Psalms145:7 Ba tla tsebagatša botho bjo bogolo bja gago, ba gobela go loka ga gago." 
Psalms145:8 Morena o na le kgaugelo le lešoko; ga a befelwe ka pela, mme o tletše leratorato." 
Psalms145:9 O loketše dihlolwa tša gagwe ka moka, mme o di šokela tšohle." 
Psalms145:10 Dihlolwa tša gago ka moka di tla go tumiša; ba ba go botegelago le bona ba tla go reta. 
Psalms145:11 Ba tla anega letago la gago le bogoši bja gago, ba bega le maatla a gago," 
Psalms145:12 gore bohle ba tsebe tiro tša gago tše maatla, le letago la gago le bogoši bja gago." 
Psalms145:13 Bogoši bja gago ke bja go ya go ile, le mmušo wa gago ke wa go dulela ruri melokong ka moka. Morena o botegela dikholofetšo tšohle tša gagwe, le gona o na le botho go tšohle tše a di dirago." 
Psalms145:14 Morena o thekga bohle ba ba wago; o kgothatša bohle ba ba nyamilego. 
Psalms145:15 Diphedi tšohle di go lebelela di holofetše, gomme o di fa dijo lebakeng la gona." 
Psalms145:16 O khuporolla seatla sa gago, wa fa diphedi tšohle tše di di nyakago." 
Psalms145:17 Morena o lokile go tšohle tše a di dirago; o na le botho medirong ya gagwe ka moka. 
Psalms145:18 Morena o kgauswi le bohle ba ba mo llelago, ke ra ba ba mo llelago ka mmannete." 
Psalms145:19 O phethagatša ditumo tša ba ba mmoifago; ba ba mo llelago o a ba kwa mme a ba hlakodiša. 
Psalms145:20 Morena o babalela bohle ba ba mo ratago; bakgopo ka moka bona o a ba fediša. 
Psalms145:21 Nna ke tla tumiša Morena; batho bohle a ba mo tumiše go ya go ile, ka ge e le yo mokgethwa." 
Psalms146:1 Retang Morena! A ke tumiše Morena! 
Psalms146:2 Ke tla mo reta bophelong bja ka ka moka; ge ke sa phela ke tla opelela Modimo wa ka ditumišo. 
Psalms146:3 Le se ke la ikanya babuši, batho ba nama, ba go se kgone go phološa." 
Psalms146:4 Motho wa nama ge a ehwa o boela mobung; ke mohla merero ya gagwe e phuhlamago. 
Psalms146:5 Go lehlogonolo yo a thušwago ke Modimo wa Jakobo, yo a botilego Morena Modimo wa gagwe," 
Psalms146:6 yena yo a hlodilego legodimo le lefase le lewatle le tšohle tše di lego ka go ona. Ka mehla o a botega. 
Psalms146:7 Ba ba gateletšwego o ba dira ka toka, ba ba swerwego ke tlala o ba fa dijo. Morena o lokolla bagolegwa," 
Psalms146:8 o budulla difofu, o kgothatša ba ba nyamilego, o rata baloki." 
Psalms146:9 Morena o babalela bafaladi, ke mmabaledi wa ditšhiwana le bahlologadi, mola bakgopo bona a ba kgopamišetša ditsela." 
Psalms146:10 Morena o tla buša go ya go ile; Modimo wa gago, wena Sione, o tla buša ka go sa felego. Retang Morena!" 
Psalms147:1 Retang Morena! Ke mo gobotse go opelela Modimo wa rena ditumišo; go a kgahliša ebile go a swanela go mo reta. 
Psalms147:2 Morena o tsošološa Jerusalema; o kgoboketša mathopša a Israele. 
Psalms147:3 O homotša ba ba nyamilego, o ba kgothatša manyaming a bona." 
Psalms147:4 O beile dinaledi ka palo ya tšona, a thea ye nngwe le ye nngwe leina." 
Psalms147:5 Mong wa rena ke yo mogolo, yo maatlamaatla, bohlale bja gagwe ga bo elwe." 
Psalms147:6 Morena o babalela banyatšegi, bakgopo bona o a ba kokobetša." 
Psalms147:7 Opelelang Morena sefela sa tebogo, le opelele Modimo wa rena le letša sekgapa." 
Psalms147:8 O pipa leratadima ka maru, o nešetša lefase pula, o mediša bjang mebotong." 
Psalms147:9 O fa diphoofolo dijo tša tšona, le mafotwane a magokobu ge a lla." 
Psalms147:10 Ga a iše felo ka maatla a pere, le a mohlabani ga a mo kgahle;" 
Psalms147:11 o kgahlwa ke ba ba mmoifago, ba ba botilego rato la gagwe, kilaphetogo." 
Psalms147:12 Reta Morena, wena Jerusalema! Tumiša Modimo wa gago, wena Sione!" 
Psalms147:13 Gobane ke yena a dudišago batho ba gagwe ka boiketlo; ke yena a šegofatšago badudi ba gago. 
Psalms147:14 Ke yena a tlišago khutšo nageng ya lena, gape a le khorišago ka dijo tše bosebose." 
Psalms147:15 O ntšha ditaelo tša gagwe lefaseng, gomme di fihla ka pela." 
Psalms147:16 O neša lehlwa la šweufala bjalo ka leokodi; šobane o e gaša bjalo ka molora. 
Psalms147:17 O neša sefako se sekoto; botšididi bja sona bo ka kgotlelelwa ke mang? 
Psalms147:18 A ntšha taelo, tšeo ka moka tša tologa; a fokiša phefo, meetse a tšona a ela." 
Psalms147:19 Tše a di laetšego o di tsebiša Bajakobo, ee, bona Baisraele ditaelo le melao ya gagwe o ba begela tšona." 
Psalms147:20 Ga go tšhaba se sengwe se a se diretšego bjalo, gomme taelo tša gagwe bona ga ba di tsebe. Retang Morena!" 
Psalms148:1 Retang Morena! Retang Morena le le magodimong; mo reteng, lena le lego godimo." 
Psalms148:2 Mo reteng, lena barongwa ka moka; mo reteng, lena dihlolwa tša legodimong." 
Psalms148:3 Mo reteng, lena letšatši le ngwedi; mo reteng, lena dinaledi tšohle le phadimago." 
Psalms148:4 Mo reteng, lena magodimo a godimodimo, le lena meetse a ka godimo ga leratadima." 
Psalms148:5 Tšohle a di rete Morena, yo e rilego ge a laela, tša hlolega." 
Psalms148:6 O di beetše ruri madulong a tšona ka taelo ya go ya go ile. 
Psalms148:7 Retang Morena mo lefaseng, lena bommamogašwa le lena diphamphamadiba tšohle;" 
Psalms148:8 lena magadima le sefako le lehlwa le kgodi, le lena madimo, le kwago taelo tša gagwe;" 
Psalms148:9 lena dithaba le meboto yohle, le lena meremelewa le mesedere yohle;" 
Psalms148:10 lena phoofolo tša nageng le diruiwa; lena digagabi le dinonyana tša go fofa," 
Psalms148:11 lena magoši a lefase le lena merafe yohle; lena babuši le lena balaodi ba lefaseng; 
Psalms148:12 lena masogana le lena makgarebe; lena batšofadi le lena bafsa. 
Psalms148:13 Bohle a ba rete Morena; ke yena fela a phagamego, bogoši bja gagwe bo okametše lefase le legodimo." 
Psalms148:14 O tiišitše Baisraele, tšhaba sa gagwe, bona ka moka ba ba mmotegelago, sona tšhaba se se lego kgauswi le yena, gore se mo rete. Retang Morena!" 
Psalms149:1 Retang Morena! Opelelang Morena sefela se sefsa; opelang sereto sa gagwe le le phuthego ya ba ba mmotegelago. 
Psalms149:2 Baisraele a ba thabele Mmopi wa bona; ba Sione a ba gobele Kgoši ya bona megobo; 
Psalms149:3 a ba mo rete ba opela; ba mo opelele ba letša meropa le dikgapa. 
Psalms149:4 Gobane Morena o kgahlwa ke tšhaba sa gagwe; baikokobetši o ba godiša ka go ba phološa. 
Psalms149:5 Ba ba mmotegelago a ba hlalale ba mo godiše; a ba mo thabele ba le malaong a bona. 
Psalms149:6 A ba mo rete ba goeletša, ba swere tšhoša tša magalemabedi" 
Psalms149:7 go itefeletša go baditšhaba; go otla merafe e šele," 
Psalms149:8 le go bofa dikgoši tša bona ka diketane, le babuši ba bona ka ditshipi," 
Psalms149:9 le go ba otla ka mo go laetšego Modimo, ya ba gona go godiša bohle ba ba mmotegelago. Retang Morena!" 
Psalms150:1 Retang Morena! Retang Modimo ka Ntlongkgethwa ya gagwe! Mo reteng ka fase ga leratadima la gagwe le legolo! 
Psalms150:2 Mo reteleng tše maatla tše a di dirilego, mo reteleng maatla a gagwe a magolo!" 
Psalms150:3 Mo reteng ka diphalafala, mo reteng ka diharepa le dikgapa!" 
Psalms150:4 Mo reteng ka meropa le megobo, mo reteng ka dikwadi le dinaka!" 
Psalms150:5 Mo reteng ka masenkana a medumomebotse, mo reteng ka masenkana a magolo!" 
Psalms150:6 Tšohle tše di phelago a di rete Morena! Retang Morena! 
Proverbs1:1 Tše ke diema tša Kgoši Solomone wa Israele, morwa wa Dafida." 
Proverbs1:2 Ke diema tše di tlago go thuša go lemoga bohlale le dikeletšo tše botse, le go kwešiša dika tše di nyakago tsebo ya mmakgonthe." 
Proverbs1:3 Di ka go ruta go phela ka bohlale le ka moo o ka botegago ka gona, wa dira dilo ka toka, wa se kgethologanye batho." 
Proverbs1:4 Di ka hlalefiša ba ba se nago tsebo, gape tša ruta bafsa kwešišo le temogo." 
Proverbs1:5 Dihlalefi le tšona a di theetše mme di oketše tsebo ya tšona, gomme bao ba rutegilego ba tla hlahlwa," 
Proverbs1:6 gore ba tle ba kwešiše diema le dika tše ba bohlale ba di bolelago, le dithai tša bona." 
Proverbs1:7 Go boifa Morena ke ona mathomo a bohlale. Ditlatla di nyatša bohlale, di gana go rutwa." 
Proverbs1:8 Ngwanaka, o ele tše tatago a go rutago tšona hloko, o se hlokomologe tše o di rutwago ke mmago." 
Proverbs1:9 Dithuto tša bona di tla go dira mothomotho bjalo ka ge kefa ye botse goba pheta e swanela motho. 
Proverbs1:10 Ngwanaka, ge badiradibe ba go gokagoketša, o gane." 
Proverbs1:11 Mohlomongwe ba ka re: “Yaa le rena re yo lalela motho yo re ka mmolayago! Re kgahlwa ke go khukhunela ba ba se nago molato. 
Proverbs1:12 Re tla ba hwetša ba phela gabotse ba iketlile, gomme re ba bolayeng ba swane le ba ba theogelago bodulabahu!" 
Proverbs1:13 Re tla hwetša mahumo a mehutahuta, gomme ra tlatša nywako ya rena ka dithebola!" 
Proverbs1:14 Yaa le rena, gomme re tla abelana dilo tšeo le wena.”" 
Proverbs1:15 O se ke wa sepela le batho ba mohuta woo, ngwanaka, o ba tšhabe!" 
Proverbs1:16 Ba kitimela go dira dilo tše mpe, ba itlhaganela le go bolaya motho." 
Proverbs1:17 Ga go thuše selo go rea molaba mola nonyana ye o nyakago go e tanya e o bona," 
Proverbs1:18 eupša bona ka bobona ba itheela molaba, molaba woo o tlago ba tanya." 
Proverbs1:19 Ka wona mokgwa woo mohlakodi o bolawa ke se a se hlakotšego – seo ke se se hlagelago mang le mang yo a hlakolago. 
Proverbs1:20 Theetšang! Bohlale bo goeletša mekgotheng, bo hlaboša lentšu mapatlelong," 
Proverbs1:21 bo bitša bo le dikhutlong tša mekgotha ye megolo le masorong a motse bo re: 
Proverbs1:22 “Lena bahlokatsebo! Le tla rata go hloka tsebo go fihla neng? Lena bakweri, le tla lesa neng go kgahlwa ke dikwero? Lena ditlatla, le tla tlogela neng go nyatša tsebo?" 
Proverbs1:23 Le theetšeng ge ke le kgala; ke tla le fa bohlale bja ka ka bontši, ka le ruta tše ke di tsebago." 
Proverbs1:24 Ke kgale ke le bitša, eupša lena le a gana; ke le bitša le ka letsogo, go se yo a ntšhetšago." 
Proverbs1:25 Le hlokomologile dikeletšo tša ka gomme la gana ge ke le sola. 
Proverbs1:26 Ka gona ge le welwa ke masetlapelo, nna ke tla le sega. Ke tla le kwera ge le swarwa ke letšhogo," 
Proverbs1:27 ge letšhogo le le wela bjalo ka magadima, ge tahlego e le tlela boka ledimo gomme le gakanegile le tlaletšwe." 
Proverbs1:28 Ke mo le tlago mpitša, eupša ka se arabe; le tla nnyaka, eupša le ka se nkhwetše." 
Proverbs1:29 Le be le hloile tsebo, le ikgethetše go se boife Morena." 
Proverbs1:30 Le be le sa nyake keletšo ya ka, le gona le nnyatša ka mehla ge ke le sola." 
Proverbs1:31 Ka fao le tla hwetša se se le swanetšego, gomme la šišingwa maanonyana ale a lena." 
Proverbs1:32 Batho ba go hloka tsebo ba bolawa ke go gana bohlale. Mašilo a fedišwa ke go se šetše ga ona. 
Proverbs1:33 Eupša yo a ntheetšago o tla dula a bolokegile. O tla iketla a se boife kotsi.” 
Proverbs2:1 Ngwanaka, ge o ka amogela dikeletšo tša ka, wa se lebale ditaelo tša ka," 
Proverbs2:2 wa hlwaela bohlale tsebe, wa leka go bo hlaologanya," 
Proverbs2:3 ge o ka duma go ba le temogo, wa fišegela go ba le kwešišo," 
Proverbs2:4 ge o ka nyaka bohlale boka silibera, wa bo tsoma bjalo ka lehumo le le fihlilwego," 
Proverbs2:5 gona o tla tseba gore go boifa Morena ke go reng, le go tseba Modimo o tla go lemoga," 
Proverbs2:6 gobane ke Morena yo a fago motho bohlale; tsebo le kwešišo di tšwa go yena. 
Proverbs2:7 O atla baloki, o šireletša bahlokabosodi." 
Proverbs2:8 O hlokomela gore go dirwe ka toka, o leta bao ba mmotegelago." 
Proverbs2:9 Ge o ka theetša o tla kwešiša toka le tshwanelo le se e lego sa maleba – o tla tšea ka tsela tše di lokilego. 
Proverbs2:10 O tla ba yo bohlale, gomme tsebo e tla go thabiša." 
Proverbs2:11 Tebeledišišo e tla go lotola; kwešišo e tla go šireletša. 
Proverbs2:12 Bohlale bo tla go phemiša tsela ye mpe le batho ba boradia – 
Proverbs2:13 batho ba ba hlanametšego bophelo bja go loka gore ba phele leswiswing la sebe," 
Proverbs2:14 batho ba ba kgahlwago ke go dira tše mpe, ba ba thabišwago ke bošaedi bja bokgopo," 
Proverbs2:15 batho ba ba sepelago ka tsela tše kgopamego ba ba dirago tše di tšwilego tseleng. 
Proverbs2:16 Bo tla go phemiša mosadi wa go hloka maitshwaro, seotswa sa leleme le boreledi," 
Proverbs2:17 yo a sa botegelego monna yo a mo nyetšego e sa le lekgarebe, a lebalago keno ye a e ennego pele ga Modimo wa gagwe." 
Proverbs2:18 Go ya ga gagwe ke go ipolaya, go ya gona ke go ya bodulabahu." 
Proverbs2:19 Bohle ba ba mo etelago ga ba boe. Ga ba boele tseleng ya bophelo. 
Proverbs2:20 Ka fao, o sepele tseleng ya baloki, o se aroge mmileng wa bona." 
Proverbs2:21 Baloki ba tla fela ba dutše mo nageng, go yona bahlokabosodi ba tla dula ba le gona." 
Proverbs2:22 Bakgopo bona ba tla fedišwa go yona; bahlokapotego ba tla tumolwa go yona boka sekoro. 
Proverbs3:1 Ngwanaka, o se lebale tše ke go rutilego tšona, o fele o gopola ditaelo tša ka," 
Proverbs3:2 gobane di tla go okeletša bophelo bja katlego. 
Proverbs3:3 O se lese go ba le leratorato le potego; o ikgabiše ka tšona bjalo ka pheta molaleng, o di boloke ka pelong ya gago." 
Proverbs3:4 Ge o ka dira bjalo o tla kgahla Modimo le batho, wa ba le seriti mo go bona." 
Proverbs3:5 O tshephe Morena ka pelo ya gago ka moka. O se ke wa tshepha kwešišo ya gago. 
Proverbs3:6 O gopole Morena dilong tšohle tše o di dirago, gomme yena o tla go lokišetša ditsela." 
Proverbs3:7 O se ke wa iphora wa re o hlalefile, eupša o boife Morena, gomme o gane go dira tše mpe." 
Proverbs3:8 Go dira bjalo e tla ba mo nkego ke sehlare se se fodišago, sa go lapološa mmele." 
Proverbs3:9 O hlomphe Morena ka go mo fa kabelo ya tše o nago natšo, le ya tšohle tše kaonekaone tše o di bunago tšhemong ya gago." 
Proverbs3:10 Ke moo dišego tša gago di tlago tlala mabele, gomme le mapitlelo a gago a diterebe a tla falala beine." 
Proverbs3:11 Ngwanaka, ge Morena a go otla o se ke wa belaela, le ge a go kgala o se ke wa tsota," 
Proverbs3:12 gobane Morena o kgala yo a mo ratago, bjalo ka ge tatagongwana a kgala morwagwe yo a mo kgahlago." 
Proverbs3:13 Go lehlogonolo motho yo a ikhweletšago bohlale, yo a ikhweletšago kwešišo." 
Proverbs3:14 Bohlale bo na le poelo go feta silibera, mohola wa bjona o phala wa gauta." 
Proverbs3:15 Bohlale bo feta magakabje ka bohlokwa; ga go se o ka se nyakago, ngwanaka, se se swanago nabjo." 
Proverbs3:16 Bo go fa bophelo bjo botelele ka letsogo la go ja, mme ka la nngele bja go fa mahumo le tlhomphego." 
Proverbs3:17 Bohlale bo dira gore motho a tsefelwe ke bophelo, le gore a phele a bolokegile." 
Proverbs3:18 Yo a nago le bohlale o phela gabotse; ba lehlogonolo ke ba ba bo kgomarelago. 
Proverbs3:19 Morena o theile lefase ka bohlale, mme ka tlhaologanyo a bea leratadima madulong a lona." 
Proverbs3:20 O aroganya phamphamadiba ka tsebo ya gagwe; o neša pula ka maru. 
Proverbs3:21 Ngwanaka, o itshwarelele ka bohlalehlale le tebeledišišo; dilo tše di se ke tša ba tša go tšhabela." 
Proverbs3:22 Di tla go phediša, wa ikgabiša ka tšona bjalo ka pheta molaleng." 
Proverbs3:23 Ke mo o tlago phela o šireletšegile, wa se kgopše." 
Proverbs3:24 Ge o robala o ka se boife, ge o robetše o tla robala boroko." 
Proverbs3:25 O ka se šie go welwa ke madimabe, goba kotsi ye e welago bakgopo," 
Proverbs3:26 gobane Morena o tla go lotola, a go phemiša sefu." 
Proverbs3:27 O se time motho se sebotse se a se hlokago, ge o ka kgona go mo thuša." 
Proverbs3:28 O se re go motho: “Sepela, o boe gosasa ke tla go fa,” etšwe o na le se a se kgopelago." 
Proverbs3:29 Mongwekawena yo a phelago nago a go tshephile o se mo logele maanomabe. 
Proverbs3:30 O se rumole motho a se a go dira se sebe. 
Proverbs3:31 O se hufegele kgowa, le gona o se tšee le ka e tee ya tsela tša gagwe," 
Proverbs3:32 gobane Morena o šišingwa modiratšempe, kganthe moloki yena o a mo tshepha." 
Proverbs3:33 Lapa la yo kgopo le rogakilwe ke Morena, mola la baloki lona a le šegofaditše." 
Proverbs3:34 Bakodutli o a ba kodutla, kganthe baikokobetši bona o ba direla tše dibotse." 
Proverbs3:35 Ba bohlale ba itirela seriti, mola mašilo sa bona e le bogoboga." 
Proverbs4:1 Bana ba ka, le theetšeng tše tatagolena a le rutago tšona. Le theetšeng, gore le tle le hlalefe." 
Proverbs4:2 Tše ke le rutago tšona di lokile, ka gona le se di furalele." 
Proverbs4:3 Nna ka noši ke be ke le mošemanyana, ke rutwa ke tate, ke le mmamoratwa, motswalwanoši wa mma." 
Proverbs4:4 Tate o be a nthuta a re: “O gopole tše ke go botšago tšona. O phethe taelo tša ka, mme o tla phela." 
Proverbs4:5 O ikhweletše bohlale le temogo. O se lebale goba wa furalela tše ke di bolelago. 
Proverbs4:6 O se lahle bohlale, gomme bo tla go šireletša; o bo rate, gomme bo tla go boloka." 
Proverbs4:7 Mathomo a bohlale ke go inyakela bjona; o ikhweletše kwešišo ka tšohle tše o nago natšo. 
Proverbs4:8 O godiše bohlale, gomme bo tla go godiša. O bo gokarele, gomme bo tla go fa seriti." 
Proverbs4:9 Bo tla go rweša seala hlogong; bo tla go rweša mphapahlogo wo mobotse.” 
Proverbs4:10 O ntheetše, ngwanaka. O amogele dikeletšo tša ka, gomme o tla phela galelele." 
Proverbs4:11 Ke tla go bontšha tsela ya bohlale; ke tla go sepetša tseleng ya boloki. 
Proverbs4:12 Ge o sepela o ka se šitišwe ke selo, le ge o kitima o ka se thetšwe." 
Proverbs4:13 Ka mehla o kgomarele tše ke go laelago tšona, di se go phonyokge. Bophelo bja gago bo itshwarelele ka tšona – o di hlokomele gabotse." 
Proverbs4:14 O se tšee ka tsela ya bakgopo, o se sepele mmileng wa ba babe." 
Proverbs4:15 O o šikologe, o se tšee ka wona; o o furalele, o itshepelele." 
Proverbs4:16 Ba babe ga ba robale ge ba se ba dira se sebe. Ge ba se ba senyetša motho, ba lala ba hlobaela." 
Proverbs4:17 Ba ja bokgopo bjalo ka bogobe, ba nwa šiši bjalo ka beine." 
Proverbs4:18 Tsela ya baloki e swana le mahwibi a masa, ao seetša sa ona se tagago se keka, go fihlela letšatši le hlaba." 
Proverbs4:19 Tsela ya bakgopo yona e swana le leswiswi la kgampi; ga ba tsebe se se tlago ba thetša. 
Proverbs4:20 O hlokomele tše ke go botšago tšona, ngwanaka, o hlwaele dipolelo tša ka tsebe." 
Proverbs4:21 O se ke wa di lebala; o di boloke ka pelong ya gago. 
Proverbs4:22 Di phediša ba ba di kwago, di ba phediša gabotse mmeleng le moyeng." 
Proverbs4:23 Se bohlokwa go feta tšohle ke go itota go tše o di naganago, gobane ke tšona di laolago bophelo bja gago." 
Proverbs4:24 O ile go bolela maaka; polelo tša boradia di se tšwe go wena. 
Proverbs4:25 O lebelele pele o yago, o ipeakanyetše tša ka moso." 
Proverbs4:26 O itokišetše tše o nyakago go di dira, ke mo o tlago tšea magato a maleba." 
Proverbs4:27 O se aroge tseleng ye e lokilego wa phamogela felo; o ikgaoganye le bobe. 
Proverbs5:1 Ngwanaka, ela bohlale bja ka hloko; hlwaya tsebe, o kwe tša tlhaologanyo ya ka." 
Proverbs5:2 Ke mo o tlago tseba go dira ka tebeledišišo, wa bolela ka tsebo." 
Proverbs5:3 Melomo ya seotswa e rotha todi; leleme la gagwe le boreledi go feta makhura a mohlware," 
Proverbs5:4 eupša mafelelo a tša gagwe a baba wa lengana; o gobatša bjalo ka tšhoša ya magalemabedi. 
Proverbs5:5 O theošetša motho bodulabahu; tsela ye a sepelago ka yona e iša lehung. 
Proverbs5:6 Ga a swarelele tseleng ye e išago bophelong; tsela tša gagwe di manyokenyoke, fela yena ga a lemoge." 
Proverbs5:7 Bjale o ntheetše, ngwanaka, o phethe tše ke go botšago tšona." 
Proverbs5:8 O se batamele mosadi wa mohuta woo; o se sepelele kgauswi le mojako wa ngwako wa gagwe," 
Proverbs5:9 gore seriti se o bego o na le sona se se fiwe bangwe, mme wena wa loba mengwaga ya bofsa bja gago ka yena mohlokalešoko yoo." 
Proverbs5:10 Bašele ba tla ithabiša ka mahumo a gago, gomme tšeo o di katanetšego ya ba tša yo mongwe." 
Proverbs5:11 Mafelelong a bophelo bja gago, mola o fela nama tša mmele, o tla tsetla" 
Proverbs5:12 wa re: “Ke be ke reng ke hloya go kgalwa, le go solwa ke go nyatša?" 
Proverbs5:13 Ke be ke sa theetše ba ba nthutago; ba ba ntayago ke be ke sa ba hlwaele tsebe. 
Proverbs5:14 Ke nyakile go welwa ke kotsi ya mafelelo phuthegong.” 
Proverbs5:15 Mosadi wa gago ke sediba, ke mothopo wa meetse a a hlwekilego; o inyorolle ka yena fela." 
Proverbs5:16 O reng o nyaka go tšhollela bonna bja gago basading ba bangwe, wa senya peu ya gago go metlabo?" 
Proverbs5:17 O e šomiše go mosadi wa gago fela, e sego go ba bangwe." 
Proverbs5:18 A sediba sa gago, yena mosadi yo o mo nyetšego o sa le lesogana, se atlege; o ithabiše ka yena," 
Proverbs5:19 yena wa botse bja kgama, wa go bopega a etša kome. A matswele a gagwe a go kgotsofatše ka mehla; ka mehla lerato la gagwe le go thabiše." 
Proverbs5:20 Ngwanaka, o reng o ka thabišwa ke seotswa? O reng o ka gokarela mosadi wa monna yo mongwe?" 
Proverbs5:21 Morena o bona tšohle tše motho a di dirago; o lebeletše mesepelo yohle ya gagwe. 
Proverbs5:22 Yo kgopo o tanywa ke dikarogo tša gagwe, o tlengwa ke molaba wa dibe tša gagwe." 
Proverbs5:23 O tla hwa a bolawa ke go hloka boitshwaro; a timetšwa ke botlatla bja gagwe bjo bogolo. 
Proverbs6:1 Ngwanaka, ge o itlemile go lefela motho molato wa gagwe ge yena a palelwa, ge o ikanne go lefela motho yo a jetšego molato mpeng," 
Proverbs6:2 ge o tantšwe ka tše o di boletšego, ge mantšu a gago e bile moreo go wena," 
Proverbs6:3 gona o wetše ka diatleng tša motho yoo. Go intšha bothateng, ngwanaka, o dire ka mokgwa wo: O akgofe o ye go yena, o mo rapele." 
Proverbs6:4 O se robale, o dule o phafogile." 
Proverbs6:5 O itlhakodiše bjalo ka tshephe go motsomi, goba bjalo ka nonyana sefung sa morei." 
Proverbs6:6 Wena sebodu, eya makekeng, o bone ka mo a phelago ka gona, gomme o ithute ka ona." 
Proverbs6:7 Le ge a se ne moetapele, goba molaodi, goba mmuši," 
Proverbs6:8 a ipolokela dijo selemo; a ikgobokeletša mefago ge go bunwa. 
Proverbs6:9 Sebodu towe, o tla robala go fihlela neng? O tla tsoga neng?" 
Proverbs6:10 Sona se fetola ka go re: “Ke sa nyaka go robala gannyane, ke bo re šwaa, ke phuthe matsogo, ke bo fokotše gosenene.”" 
Proverbs6:11 Ge o ka no pompala, bodiidi bo tla go phuthuma bjalo ka mohlakodi, mohlako wa go tsetsela bjalo ka mokgopedi." 
Proverbs6:12 Motho wa senokwane, wa sehwirihwiri, ke yo a tšamago a bolela maaka," 
Proverbs6:13 yo a kobonyago bangwe ka leihlo, a ngwalangwala fase ka leoto, a šupašupa batho ka monwana;" 
Proverbs6:14 ke yo a dulago a loga maanomabe ka pelo ya bomenetša, a lweša batho." 
Proverbs6:15 Ke ka baka leo a tlago khukhunetšwa ke madimabe, gateetee a hwa la pitšana." 
Proverbs6:16 Go na le dilo tše tshelelago tše Morena a di hloilego, gabotsebotse ke tše di šupago tše di mo šišimišago:" 
Proverbs6:17 ke boikgogomošo, le go bolela maaka, le go bolaya ba ba se nago molato;" 
Proverbs6:18 ke go loga maanomabe, le lephakuphaku la go dira tše mpe;" 
Proverbs6:19 ke hlatse ya maaka, seaketšabatho, le twešameloko." 
Proverbs6:20 Ngwanaka, o phethe taelo tša tatago, le tše o di rutwago ke mmago o se di hlokomologe." 
Proverbs6:21 O dule o di bolokile ka pelong ya gago, o ikgabiše ka tšona bjalo ka pheta molaleng." 
Proverbs6:22 Di tla go hlahla ge o sepela, tša go leta ge o robetše, tša bolela nago ge o tsoga." 
Proverbs6:23 Ditaelo tša tatago ke lebone, tše o di rutwago ke mmago ke seetša; go solwa ke bona ke tsela ya bophelo." 
Proverbs6:24 Ke tša go go phemiša seotswa, mosadi wa leleme le boreledi wa monna yo mongwe." 
Proverbs6:25 O se goketšwe ke botse bja mosadi yoo, wa tanywa ke melebelelo ya gagwe." 
Proverbs6:26 Segwebakathobalo le ka senkgwa motho a ka se reka, kganthe seotswa sona se inyakela lehumo la motho." 
Proverbs6:27 Kgane motho a ka gogolela mollo difarong a se tšhume diaparo tša gagwe? 
Proverbs6:28 Na motho a ka gata magala a se swe dinao? 
Proverbs6:29 Di bjalo tša yo a robalago le mosadi wa monna yo mongwe. Yo a mo kgomago a ka se re phankga. 
Proverbs6:30 Lehodu la go utswa dijo go ntšha tlala maleng batho ga ba le sole; 
Proverbs6:31 eupša ge le ka swarwa le lefišwa gašupa, le ge e ka ba ka thoto yohle ya lapa la lona." 
Proverbs6:32 Ge e le monna yo a otswago, yena o itlhokiša tlhaologanyo. Taba ya mohuta wo e dirwa fela ke moipolai." 
Proverbs6:33 O tla papatlwa, a hlomphollwa; o tla gobošetšwa sa ruri;" 
Proverbs6:34 gobane lehufa le galefiša monna; ge a itefeletša ga a na lešoko. 
Proverbs6:35 Ga a amogele phophotho, ga a fepeletšege, ešita le ge e ka ba ka mpho ye kaakang." 
Proverbs7:1 Ngwanaka, o gopole tše ke go botšago tšona, ditaelo tša ka o se di lebale." 
Proverbs7:2 O di phethe, gomme o tla phela; tše ke go rutago tšona o di hlokomele bjalo ka tlhaka ya leihlo la gago." 
Proverbs7:3 O dule o di gopotše, o di bolokile ka pelong ya gago." 
Proverbs7:4 Bohlale o bo tšee e le kgaetšedi ya gago, mme temogo e be moloko weno." 
Proverbs7:5 Di tla go phemiša mosadi wa seotswa, mosadi wa go hloka maitshwaro, wa leleme le boreledi." 
Proverbs7:6 Ka tšatši le lengwe ke be ke ukametše ka ntle ka lefasetere la ngwako wa ka," 
Proverbs7:7 ka bona batho ba bantši ba go tšeatšeega; gare ga masogana ka bona le lengwe le e bego e le setlatla. 
Proverbs7:8 Le be le sepela mokgotheng, kgauswi le magahlano a ona ao go ona go bego go dula mosadi yo mongwe. Lesogana leo le be le tšere ka tsela ye e fetago ngwakong wa mosadi yoo" 
Proverbs7:9 e le mantšiboa, leswiswana le swara." 
Proverbs7:10 Mosadi a le gahlanetša; o be a apere bjalo ka segwebakathobalo gomme a na le mahlajana. 
Proverbs7:11 E be e le mosadi wa go se šie, wa go itaola, wa go se dule ka gae." 
Proverbs7:12 O be a hwetšwa mekgotheng le mabaleng a motse, a dula a letile le magahlanong a mekgotha." 
Proverbs7:13 O ile u ubarela lesogana lela, a le atla, a le lebelela ka mahlong, mme a re:" 
Proverbs7:14 “Lehono ke ile ka swanela go dira dihlabelo tša ka tša kagišano, ke phetha dikeno tša ka, gomme ke sa na le nama ya dihlabelo tšeo ka gae." 
Proverbs7:15 Ka gona ke tšwile ngwakong wa ka ke tlilo go gahlanetša. Ke be ke nyaka go go bona, gomme bjale ke go hweditše." 
Proverbs7:16 Ke adile dikobo tša mebalabala tša Egepeta malaong a ka. 
Proverbs7:17 Ke tšhetše marobalo ao senkgabose sa mira, sa sekgopha le sa sinamone." 
Proverbs7:18 Tlaa re yo lala re ipshina ka lerato go fihlela go esa! A re yo thabišana ka go kgomana. 
Proverbs7:19 Mogatšake ga a gona mo gae; o ile kgole. 
Proverbs7:20 O sepetše le tšhelete ye ntši gomme o tla tšea beke tše pedi a se gona.” 
Proverbs7:21 Ka gona mosadi a gokagoketša lesogana lela ka dipolelo tša gagwe tše ntši tše boreledi, a le foraforetša ka leleme la gagwe le boleta." 
Proverbs7:22 Lesogana la napa la sepela le yena bjalo ka pholo ye e išwago tlhabong, bjalo ka kgama ye e gogwago ka thapo" 
Proverbs7:23 ge e išwa moo e tlago hlabja pelo ka lerumo, la swana le nonyana ye e hlaganelago ka sefung – le sa tsebe gore le a ipolaya." 
Proverbs7:24 Bjale, bana ba ka, ntheetšeng! Hlokomelang se ke se bolelago." 
Proverbs7:25 Le se ke la lesa mosadi yoo a thopa dipelo tša lena; le se ke la amana le yena ka selo. 
Proverbs7:26 O ušitše banna ba bantši, o išitše ba bantšintši tahlegong." 
Proverbs7:27 Ge o eya ngwakong wa gagwe, o tseleng ya go ya bodulabahu. Ke tsela ya go kgaoletša ye e išago lehung." 
Proverbs8:1 Theetšang! Bohlale bo a bitša, tlhaologanyo e a goeletša!" 
Proverbs8:2 Bohlale bo eme kua godimo ga meboto kgauswi le tsela, le kua magahlanong a mebila." 
Proverbs8:3 Bo bitša bo le ka ntle ga dikgoro tša motse, ka thoko ga masoro bo re:" 
Proverbs8:4 “Hee, ke bitša lena banna! Ke goeletša yo mongwe le yo mongwe lefaseng." 
Proverbs8:5 Lena bahlokatemogo, ithuteng go ba le kwešišo. Lena ditlatla, ithuteng go ba le kgopolo." 
Proverbs8:6 Theetšang, gobane mantšu a ka ke a therešo; ge ke bula molomo ke bolela tša go loka." 
Proverbs8:7 Ganong ga ka go tšwa nnete; ke ila go bolela bobe. 
Proverbs8:8 Se sengwe le se sengwe se ke se bolelago ke therešo; ga go seo e lego maaka goba seo se lahletšago. 
Proverbs8:9 Go motho wa tlhaologanyo taba tše di bonala gabotse; go yo a nago le tsebo taba tše di a kwešišega. 
Proverbs8:10 Ikgetheleng dithuto tša ka, e sego silibera, ikgetheleng tsebo go na le gauta ye botsebotse." 
Proverbs8:11 “Ke nna Bohlale, ke phala le magakabje; ga go se le ka se nyakago, bana ba ka, se se ka swantšhwago le nna." 
Proverbs8:12 Nna, Bohlale, ke na le tlhaologanyo; ke na le tsebo, gomme ke kgona go itokišetša tše di sa tlago." 
Proverbs8:13 Go boifa Morena ke go hloya bobe; ke hloile boikgogomošo le boikgantšho, tsela tše mpe le mantšu a boradia." 
Proverbs8:14 Ke a eletša gomme ka atlega. Ke na le tlhaologanyo, le gona ke tiile." 
Proverbs8:15 Ke thuša magoši go buša; babuši ba bea melao ya toka ka thušo ya ka. 
Proverbs8:16 Babuši bohle lefaseng – magoši le balaodi – ba buša ka go thušwa ke nna. 
Proverbs8:17 Ke rata ba ba nthatago; ba ba nnyakago ba a nkhwetša. 
Proverbs8:18 Ke na le mahumo le tlhompho, le thoto ye e sa onalego, gotee le katlego." 
Proverbs8:19 Se o se hwetšago go nna se phala le gauta ye e sego ya tswakwa; se ke se fago motho se phala le silibera ye e hlwekilego. 
Proverbs8:20 Ke sepela tseleng ya toka; ke latela ditsela tša go loka," 
Proverbs8:21 ke fa ba ba nthatago mahumo, ka tlatša le dišego tša bona." 
Proverbs8:22 “Morena o mpopile pele ga dilo ka moka, kgalekgale, pele a hlola tšohle." 
Proverbs8:23 Ke bopilwe mathomongthomong, mathomong pele lefase le hlolwa." 
Proverbs8:24 Ke belegwe pele mawatle a magolo a eba gona, pele methopo ya meetse e phulega." 
Proverbs8:25 Ke tswetšwe pele ga ge dithaba di hlongwa madulong a tšona, pele ga ge meboto e bopša," 
Proverbs8:26 pele ga ge Modimo a hlola lefase le melala ya lona, le pele ga ge dithorwana tša mathomo tša mobu di hlolwa." 
Proverbs8:27 Ke be ke le gona ge a bea leratadima madulong a lona, ge a dira mo go gomago mahlo ka lewatleng," 
Proverbs8:28 ge a bea maru legodimong, ge a phula methopo ya mawatle." 
Proverbs8:29 A laela meetse a lewatle gore a se ke a kuboga go feta ka moo a a laetšego ka gona, a tshela mellwane ya ona. Ke be ke le gona ge a hloma metheo ya lefase." 
Proverbs8:30 Ke be ke le kgauswi ga gagwe bjalo ka ngwana yo e lego mmamoratwa. Ke be ke mo thabiša letšatši ka letšatši; ka mehla ke be ke thaba ge ke na le yena – 
Proverbs8:31 ke thabela lefase le a le hlodilego, ke kgahlwa ke batho ba lona." 
Proverbs8:32 “Bjale, masogana, ntheetšeng. Go lehlogonolo ba ba dirago tše ke di bolelago." 
Proverbs8:33 Theetšang tše le di rutwago mme le tla ba ba bohlale; le se ke la di hlokomologa. 
Proverbs8:34 Go lehlogonolo yo a ntheetšago, yo a dulago mojako wa ngwako wa ka letšatši ka letšatši, a letetše seferong sa lapa la ka." 
Proverbs8:35 Motho yo a nthwetšego o hwetša bophelo, gomme o tla kgahla Morena." 
Proverbs8:36 Yo a palelwago ke go nkhwetša, o tla hwa la pitšana. Bohle ba ba ntlhoilego ba rata lehu.”" 
Proverbs9:1 Bohlale o ikagetše ngwako, a o betlela dikokwane tše di šupago." 
Proverbs9:2 O hlabile dikgomo, o natefišitše beine ya gagwe, o adile bojelo." 
Proverbs9:3 O romile bahlanka ba gagwe ba banenyana gore ba yo hlaeletša batho ba le serokameng sa motse ba re: 
Proverbs9:4 “Etlang mono, lena le sa lemogego tša bophelo!” Go bahlokatlhaologanyo a re:" 
Proverbs9:5 “Etlang, re jeng dijo tše ke le apeetšego tšona, re nweng le beine ye ke e natefišitšego." 
Proverbs9:6 Tlogelang bošilo, gomme le tla phela. Tšeang ka tsela ya temogo.”" 
Proverbs9:7 Mokgalamogegei o ikobela mahlapa; mosolayokgopo o ipakela maroga. 
Proverbs9:8 O se kgale mogegei, o tla go hloya; o kgale mohlalefi, o tla go rata." 
Proverbs9:9 Ruta mohlalefi, o tla hlalefa le go feta; ruta moloki, temogo ya gagwe e tla oketšega." 
Proverbs9:10 Mathomo a bohlale ke go boifa Morena; go tseba Mokgethwa ke yona temogo. 
Proverbs9:11 Ge o na le bohlale o tla phela galelele, o tla okeletšwa mengwaga ya go phela." 
Proverbs9:12 Bohlale bja gago bo hola wena mong, go gegea ga gago go tla babela wena." 
Proverbs9:13 Mmabotlatla ke mosadi wa lešatana, ke semaumau sa go se tsebe selo." 
Proverbs9:14 O kokomala mojako wa ngwako wa gagwe, setulong se se lego serokameng sa motse." 
Proverbs9:15 O hlaeletša bafeti ba tsela, ba ba ikelago mo ba yago gona, o re:" 
Proverbs9:16 “Etlang mono, lena le sa lemogego tša bophelo!” Go bahlokatlhaologanyo a re:" 
Proverbs9:17 “Meetse go tsefa a a utswitšwego, le selewathopeng se a natefa.”" 
Proverbs9:18 Mašilo ga a tsebe ge lehu le a laletše moo, le gore baeng ba gagwe ba theogetše fasefase bodulabahu." 
Proverbs10:1 Tše ke diema tša Solomone; Ngwana yo bohlale o thabiša tatagwe, wa setlatla yena o nyamiša mmagwe." 
Proverbs10:2 Lehumo la bohwirihwiri ga le hole motho ka selo, go loka gona go mo hlakodiša lehung." 
Proverbs10:3 Moloki Morena ga a mmolaiše tlala, bakgopo bona o ba tima tše ba di nyakago." 
Proverbs10:4 Bobodu bo diitša motho, kganthe go katana go a mo humiša." 
Proverbs10:5 Yo a bunago ka nako ya gona ke yo bohlale, raboroko wa ge go bunwa yena ke mahlabišadihlong." 
Proverbs10:6 Modimo o šegofatša moloki. Molomo wa yo kgopo o khupile bošoro. 
Proverbs10:7 Moloki o šala a gopolwa ka tebogo; yo kgopo yena sa gagwe ke go lebalwa. 
Proverbs10:8 Motho yo bohlale o dumela go laiwa, lešilo la go ratharatha lona le a itahla." 
Proverbs10:9 Yo a phelago ka botshephegi ga a boife selo, kganthe sehwirihwiri sona se tla senoga." 
Proverbs10:10 Yo a gegeago batho ka leihlo o a ba nyamiša, yo a kgalago batho a sa šie o tliša poelano." 
Proverbs10:11 Polelo tša moloki di tsošološa motho, molomo wa yo kgopo wona o khupile bošoro." 
Proverbs10:12 Lehloyo le hlola mpherefere, eupša lerato le pipa melato ka moka." 
Proverbs10:13 Motho yo bohlale o bolela tše di kwagalago, eupša wa go itlhokiša tlhaologanyo o lebanwe ke thupa." 
Proverbs10:14 Ba bohlale ba ipolokela tsebo, polelo tša lešilo tšona di hlola mathata ka pela." 
Proverbs10:15 Lehumo la mohumi ke boširelo bja gagwe boka motse wo o ageleditšwego ka morako, bodiidi bja modiidi bjona ke tahlego ya gagwe." 
Proverbs10:16 Moputso wa moloki ke bophelo, poelo ya yo kgopo yona ke kotlo." 
Proverbs10:17 Yo a theetšago ge a kgalwa o tla phela, eupša yo a hlokomologago kgalemo o tla timela." 
Proverbs10:18 Yo a utago lehloyo la gagwe ke moradia, wa lesebo yena ke setlatla." 
Proverbs10:19 Go bolela kudu go ka diriša motho sebe, yo a balago mantšu a gagwe ke yena yo bohlale." 
Proverbs10:20 Polelo tša moloki ke silibera ye e hlwekišitšwego, dikgopolo tša yo kgopo ga di hole go ya kae." 
Proverbs10:21 Polelo tša moloki di hola ba bantši, lešilo lona le bolawa ke go hloka tlhaologanyo." 
Proverbs10:22 Ke tšhegofatšo ya Morena ye e tlišetšago motho mahumo; go katana ga gagwe go ka se mo okeletše selo. 
Proverbs10:23 Setlatla se kgahlwa ke go dira tše mpe, wa tlhaologanyo yena o kgahlwa ke bohlale." 
Proverbs10:24 Se yo kgopo a se tšhabago ke sona se mo welago, baloki bona ba fiwa tše ba di nyakago." 
Proverbs10:25 Ge ledimo le feta, le feta le yo kgopo, moloki yena ga le mo dire selo." 
Proverbs10:26 Sebodu se tena mothwadi wa sona bjalo ka ge matšhidi a šiiša motho meno, le muši o fahla motho ka mahlong." 
Proverbs10:27 Yo a boifago Morena o okeletšwa matšatši, yo kgopo yena o a a fokoletšwa." 
Proverbs10:28 Se baloki ba se holofetšego ke lethabo, se bakgopo ba se holofetšego sona ga se tšwelele." 
Proverbs10:29 Morena o šireletša baloki, bona bao ba phethago thato ya gagwe; badiratšempe bona o a ba fediša." 
Proverbs10:30 Baloki ba ka se tlošwe mo nageng, bakgopo bona ba ka se dulele ruri." 
Proverbs10:31 Moloki o bolela ka bohlale, yo kgopo yena o tla ripša leleme." 
Proverbs10:32 Moloki o tseba go bolela tše di kgahlišago, yo kgopo yena o bolela tše mpe fela." 
Proverbs11:1 Morena o hloile kelo ya boradia, o thabela ye e nepagetšego." 
Proverbs11:2 Baikgogomoši ba tla gobošwa; ba bohlale ke baikokobetši. 
Proverbs11:3 Baloki ba etetšwa ke botshephegi bja bona, ba go se botege bona ba fedišwa ke bokgopo bja bona." 
Proverbs11:4 Lehumo le ka se hole motho ka selo ka tšatši la kahlolo, eupša go loka go tla mo hlakodiša lehung." 
Proverbs11:5 Go loka ga mohlokabosodi go mo lokišetša ditsela, yo kgopo yena o ipolaya ka bokgopo bja gagwe." 
Proverbs11:6 Go loka ga baloki go a ba phološa, ba go se botege bona ba tanywa ke megabaru ya bona." 
Proverbs11:7 Yo kgopo a hwa, kholofelo ya gagwe e hwa naye; go tshepha mahumo ga gagwe go ka se mo thuše ka selo." 
Proverbs11:8 Moloki o hlakodišwa mathateng, go ona gwa tsena yo kgopo." 
Proverbs11:9 Dipolelo tša mohlokamodimo di a bolaya, moloki yena o phološwa ke tsebo ya ponelopele." 
Proverbs11:10 Ge baloki ba atlega, motse o a thaba; ge bakgopo ba ehwa, go kwala mekgolokwane." 
Proverbs11:11 Motse o a tuma ge baloki ba o reta, kganthe o gobošwa ke dipolelo tša bakgopo." 
Proverbs11:12 Yo a senyago ba bangwe maina ke setlatla; yo a nago le tlhaologanyo o a ikhomolela. 
Proverbs11:13 Yo a ratago lesebo o utolla diphiri, kganthe yo a tshephegago yena o a di boloka." 
Proverbs11:14 Tšhaba sa go hloka ketapele se a thubega; baeletši ba bantši ba a se lotola. 
Proverbs11:15 Yo a itlemago go lefela motho molato ge mongmolato a palelwa, o ipea mathateng. Yo a ganago go itlema o a itota." 
Proverbs11:16 Mosadi yo botho o hlompšha ke batho; monna yo sehlogo yena sa gagwe ke go ikgobokeletša mahumo. 
Proverbs11:17 Motho wa go loka o a ikhola, yo pelompe yena ke moipolai." 
Proverbs11:18 Mogolo wa yo kgopo ga o swarelele, yo a dirago tša go loka yena o tla fiwa moputso wo o sa felego." 
Proverbs11:19 Yo a kgotleletšego go dira tša go loka o tla phela, yo a šetšego tše mpe morago yena o tla hwa." 
Proverbs11:20 Morena o sišingwa ba pelo tše mpe, ba ba phelago ba se na bosodi bona ba a mo kgahla." 
Proverbs11:21 Ruri, ba babe ba tla otlwa, baloki bona ba tla phologa." 
Proverbs11:22 Mosadi wa setswatswa ge a hloka maitshwaro o swana le lengina la gauta nkong ya kolobe. 
Proverbs11:23 Ditumo tša baloki di tla le dilo tše dibotse, lehutšo la bakgopo lona le galefiša Modimo." 
Proverbs11:24 Go na le bomafakudu ba go no atelwa ke leruo, le dingame tša go atelwa ke bodiidi." 
Proverbs11:25 Mafakudu o a atlega, mokgodišabangwe le yena o a kgodišwa." 
Proverbs11:26 Mokgobamabele wa go gana go a rekiša o rogwa ke batho; mmapatšamabele yena o lakaletšwa mahlatse. 
Proverbs11:27 Mogabadibotse o kgahla Modimo, molotadimpe yena o boelwa ke tše mpe." 
Proverbs11:28 Mmotamahumo o fetša ka go wa, moloki yena o atlega boka mahlare a matala." 
Proverbs11:29 Yo a hlokomologago lapa la gagwe o a le diitša, lešilo le fetša ka go ba mohlanka wa yo bohlale." 
Proverbs11:30 Go loka go a phediša, kgaruru yona e a bolaya." 
Proverbs11:31 Ge moloki a hwetša se se mo lebanego mo lefaseng, yo kgopo le modiradibe bona ba ka šitwa bjang!" 
Proverbs12:1 Yo a ratago go kgalwa ke yo a ratago go tseba; yo a ganago go kgalwa yena ke setlatla. 
Proverbs12:2 Morena o kgahlwa ke moloki, wa go loga maanomabe yena o a mo tšwa." 
Proverbs12:3 Bokgopo ga bo lote motho, boloki bjona bo na le tšhireletšo." 
Proverbs12:4 Mosadisadi ke seala sa monna wa gagwe; wa go leša monna wa gagwe dihlong yena ke bolwetši bo jago monna marapo. 
Proverbs12:5 Baloki ba rera tša go loka, bakgopo bona ba rera tša boradia." 
Proverbs12:6 Polelo tša bakgopo di a bolaya, tša baloki tšona di a phološa." 
Proverbs12:7 Bakgopo ba a fedišwa ya ba moka, malapa a baloki ona a dula a le gona." 
Proverbs12:8 Rabohlale o retelwa bohlale bja gagwe, rapelompe yena sa gagwe ke go nyatšwa." 
Proverbs12:9 Monyatšegi wa go ba le lekgoba o phala moiponi wa go hloka dijo. 
Proverbs12:10 Moloki o hlokomela diruiwa tša gagwe, yo kgopo yena ga a na taba le tšona." 
Proverbs12:11 Moitemelatšhemo o bolaya mabele, molatamafeela yena o itlhokiša tlhaologanyo." 
Proverbs12:12 Bakgopo ba nyaka fela go dira tše mpe, baloki bona ga ba šikinyege." 
Proverbs12:13 Yo kgopo o tanywa ke polelo tša gagwe tše mpe, moloki yena o intšha mathateng." 
Proverbs12:14 Motho o atlega ka tše a di bolelago; o boelwa ka tše a di dirago. 
Proverbs12:15 Lešilo le gopola gore le dira tše di nepagetšego, yo bohlale yena o kwa dikeletšo." 
Proverbs12:16 Lešilo le bontšha go ngala ka pela, yo bohlale yena o nyatša maroga." 
Proverbs12:17 Hlatse ye e tshephegago e bolela bohlatse bja nnete, ya maaka yona e bolela bohlatse bja bofora." 
Proverbs12:18 Polelo ya yo a sa kgethego mantšu e ka gobatša motho bjalo ka tšhoša, ya yo bohlale yona e a fodiša." 
Proverbs12:19 Therešo ke ya go ya go ile, maaka ona ga a swarelele." 
Proverbs12:20 Pelong tša ba ba logago maanomabe go letše boikaketši, badiraleago bona ba na le lethabo." 
Proverbs12:21 Baloki ga ba hlagelwe ke se sebe, bakgopo bona ba welwa ke masetlapelo a mantši." 
Proverbs12:22 Morena o šišingwa ba ba bolelago maaka, ba ba tshephegago bona o a ba thabela." 
Proverbs12:23 Go yo bohlale tsebo ke thopa, ditlatla tšona di phatlalatša bošilo bja tšona." 
Proverbs12:24 Ba ba kalokanago ba tla buša, dibodu tšona e tla ba makgoba." 
Proverbs12:25 Mathata a imela motho, mantšu a botho ona a a mo thabiša." 
Proverbs12:26 Moloki o hlahla wa gabo tseleng, bakgopo ya bona tsela e a ba timetša." 
Proverbs12:27 Sebodu ga se hwetše seo se se nyakago, yo a katanago yena o ikhweletša lehumo le legolo." 
Proverbs12:28 Go phetha thato ya Modimo ke tsela ya go iša bophelong, go kgeloga gona go iša lehung." 
Proverbs13:1 Ngwana yo bohlale o kwa kgalo ya tatagwe, mokodutli yena ga a kwe ge a kgalwa." 
Proverbs13:2 Motho o atlega ka tše a di bolelago, mohlokabotshephegi yena ke ntwadumela." 
Proverbs13:3 Moitotapolelong o tla phologa, moitebalapolelong yena ke moipolai." 
Proverbs13:4 Sebodu ga se hwetše senyakwa sa sona, mokalokani yena o ikhweletša tšohle tše a di nyakago." 
Proverbs13:5 Moloki o hloile maaka, yo kgopo yena o dira mahlabišadihlong le manyala." 
Proverbs13:6 Go phetha thato ya Modimo go šireletša mohlokabosodi, bokgopo bjona bo wiša modiradibe." 
Proverbs13:7 Ba bangwe ba itshema bahumi ba se na selo, bangwe bona ba itshema badiidi ba humile le dinala." 
Proverbs13:8 Mohumi o itokolla ka lehumo la gagwe, modiidi ga a ke a tšhošetšwa ke motho." 
Proverbs13:9 Baloki ba etša seetša se se tagago kudu, bakgopo bona ba bjalo ka lebone le le timago." 
Proverbs13:10 Wa mereba o hlola kgakgano fela, yo bohlale yena o kwa dikeletšo." 
Proverbs13:11 Lehumo letlabonolo le nyamelela gabonolo; lehumo letlabosele lona le a ata. 
Proverbs13:12 Seletelwa se se sa phethagalego se a nyamiša, senyakwa se motho a se hwetšago sona se a thabiša." 
Proverbs13:13 Monyatšakeletšo o a itahla, mophethataelo yena o tla putswa." 
Proverbs13:14 Thuto tša yo bohlale di tsošološa motho, di mo phemiša lehu." 
Proverbs13:15 Wa tlhaologanyo o ratwa ke batho, tsela ya bahlokabotshephegi e tla ba lahletša." 
Proverbs13:16 Yo bohlale o dira tšohle ka tsebo, setlatla sona se phatlalatša botlatla." 
Proverbs13:17 Motseta wa go se tshephagale o tliša mathata, wa go tshephagala yena o bušetša dilo sekeng." 
Proverbs13:18 Moganagokgalwa o tla diila a ba a goboga, mokwatsholo yena o a hlompšha." 
Proverbs13:19 Senyakwa se motho a se hwetšago se a mo thabiša. Lešilo le gana go tlogela bobe. 
Proverbs13:20 Šika le ba bohlale, o hlalefe; mokgonanalemašilo ke moipolai." 
Proverbs13:21 Badiradibe ba hlomarwa ke madimabe, baloki bona ba putswa ka tše dibotse." 
Proverbs13:22 Motho wa go loka o tlogelela ditlogolo bohwa; lefa la modiradibe lona e tla ba la moloki. 
Proverbs13:23 Mašemo a a kgathilwego a ka tlišetša badiidi mabele a mantši; moo go sego toka badiidi ba amogwa mabele ao. 
Proverbs13:24 Yo a sa otlego morwagwe ga a mo rate; yo a ratago morwagwe o a mo kgala. 
Proverbs13:25 Baloki ba ba le dijo tše di lekanego, bakgopo bona ba dula ba bolawa ke tlala." 
Proverbs14:1 Lapa le agwa ke mosadi yo bohlale, wa lešilo yena o ithubela lona." 
Proverbs14:2 Mohlokabosodi o boifa Morena, wa tselakgopo yena o a mo nyatša." 
Proverbs14:3 Lešilo le ipolaya ka dipolelo tša lona, yo bohlale yena o itšhireletša ka tše a di bolelago." 
Proverbs14:4 Ge go se dipholo tša go lema, legopo ga le be le dijo; ge dipholo di le gona, puno e ba ye ntši." 
Proverbs14:5 Hlatsepotegi ke ye e sa bolelego maaka, hlatse ya maaka yona ke seaketšabatho." 
Proverbs14:6 Mokodutli le ge a ka tsoma bohlale a ka se bo hwetše; wa tlhaologanyo yena tsebo o e hwetša gabonolo. 
Proverbs14:7 O se batamele lešilo, gobane ga go sa tlhaologanyo se le ka go botšago sona." 
Proverbs14:8 Bohlale bja setsebi ke go tseba tsela ya sona; bošilo bja lešilo bjona bo a le timetša. 
Proverbs14:9 Go setlatla sehlabelo sa dibe ke metlae; moloki o kgahla Modimo. 
Proverbs14:10 Bohloko bo kwewa ke mong wa bjona, lethabo le lona ke la mothabi." 
Proverbs14:11 Lapa la yo kgopo le tla fedišwa, la moloki lona le tla atlega." 
Proverbs14:12 Go na le tsela ye e bonalago nke e lokile, fela mafelelong e iša lehung." 
Proverbs14:13 Motho a ka no kwa bohloko ka pelong le ge a sega; lethabo le ka no felela ka manyami. 
Proverbs14:14 Mokgelogi o tla otlelwa tše a di dirilego, moloki le yena o tla putsetšwa ditiro tša gagwe." 
Proverbs14:15 Mohlokatemogo go tša bophelo ke madumelatšohle, yo bohlale yena o ipala magato." 
Proverbs14:16 Yo bohlale ke wa go ba le hlokomelo, a šikologa bobe; lešilo lona le šwahlela fela le itshephile." 
Proverbs14:17 Sefeladipelwana o dira tša bošilo; wa šedi yena o dula a fodišitše hlogo. 
Proverbs14:18 Lefa la bomohlokatemogo go tša bophelo ke bošilo, ba bohlale bona ba putswa ka tsebo." 
Proverbs14:19 Ba babe ba tla khunamela ba go loka, bakgopo ba tla obama masorong a baloki." 
Proverbs14:20 Modiidi o hloiwa le ke moagišani, mohumi yena o ratwa ke ba bantši." 
Proverbs14:21 Yo a nyatšago mongwekayena o dira sebe; go lehlogonolo yo a šokelago bahlaki. 
Proverbs14:22 A ke re mologamaanomabe ke motimedi? Moreradibotse yena o a ratwa, a botwa ke batho." 
Proverbs14:23 Go katana go tlišetša motho moputso, go etiša leleme pele gona go a mo diitša." 
Proverbs14:24 Moputso wa ba bohlale ke lehumo, wa mašilo wona ke bošilo." 
Proverbs14:25 Hlatsethereši e ka hlakodiša motho lehung, ya maaka hlatse yona ke moeki." 
Proverbs14:26 Ka go boifa Morena motho o a bolokega, le bana ba gagwe ba ba le botšhabelo." 
Proverbs14:27 Go boifa Morena go tsošološa motho, go mo phemiša lehu." 
Proverbs14:28 Bogolo bja kgoši bo ya le bontši bja tšhaba sa gagwe; go fokotšega ga sona go feleletša ka go wa ga gagwe. 
Proverbs14:29 Wa go diega go befelwa ke yo bohlale, sefelafeladipelwana yena ke lešilošilo." 
Proverbs14:30 Bopelotšhweu bo hleka mmele wa motho; lehufa lona ke bolwetši bja go ja marapo. 
Proverbs14:31 Mohlakišabahlaki o nyefola Mmopi wa bona, mošokelabadiidi yena o hlompha Morena." 
Proverbs14:32 Yo kgopo o ipolaya ka ditiro tša gagwe tše mpe, moloki yena o šireletšwa ke boloki bja gagwe." 
Proverbs14:33 Motho wa tlhaologanyo o nagana tše bohlale; ditlatla ga di tsebe selo ka bohlale. 
Proverbs14:34 Go loka go godiša setšhaba, sebe sona se goboša setšhaba." 
Proverbs14:35 Kgoši e kgahlwa ke mohlankedi wa go kgona; e galefela molešadihlong. 
Proverbs15:1 Phetolo ye boleta e okobatša pefelo, mantšu a a kgopišago wona a a e gakatša." 
Proverbs15:2 Polelo tša ba bohlale di ratiša batho tsebo, melomong ya ditlatla gona go tšhologa tša bošilo." 
Proverbs15:3 Mahlo a Morena a mo gohle, a lebeletše ba babe le ba ba lokilego." 
Proverbs15:4 Mantšu a go bea motho pelo a a mo tsošološa, a bofora ona a mo ferehla moyeng." 
Proverbs15:5 Setlatla se itebatša tše tatagosona a se rutilego tšona, yo bohlale yena o dumela go kgalwa." 
Proverbs15:6 Ka ngwakong wa moloki go tlala thoto, thoto ya yo mobe yona e tsenya mong mathateng." 
Proverbs15:7 Tsebo e gašwa ke batho ba bohlale, ga e kwalakwatšwe ke ditlatla." 
Proverbs15:8 Dihlabelo tša bakgopo di šišingwa ke Morena, dithapelo tša baloki tšona di a mo kgahla." 
Proverbs15:9 Morena o hlaswa tsela ya yo kgopo, o rata yo a dirago tše di lokilego." 
Proverbs15:10 Moarogi o tla otlwa gabohloko; mohloyatsholo o tla hwa. 
Proverbs15:11 Ge Morena a tseba tša bodulabahu le tša kua tahlegong, tša ka pelong ya motho tšona di ka mo palela bjang?" 
Proverbs15:12 Mokodutli ga a nyake go kgalwa, le maele ga a a nyake go ba bohlale." 
Proverbs15:13 Ge motho a thabile o ediša sefahlego, manyami ona a šegamiša motho." 
Proverbs15:14 Wa tlhaologanyo ke wa go nyaka go tseba, lešilo lona le kgotsofala ka bošilo." 
Proverbs15:15 Mohlaki o phela ka mohlako, ralethabo yena o phela a nyakaletše." 
Proverbs15:16 Mohloki yo a boifago Morena o phala mohumi wa go balabadišwa ke mahumo a gagwe. 
Proverbs15:17 Go šeba ka morogo le ba o ratanago nabo, go phala go ja dimakhura le ba o hloyanego nabo." 
Proverbs15:18 Mofelapelwana o hlola phapano, mopelotelele yena o a e lamola." 
Proverbs15:19 Sebodu sa gagwe ke mathata mo gohle, moloki yena ga a be le ona." 
Proverbs15:20 Ngwana yo bohlale o thabiša tatagwe, wa setlatla yena o nyatša mmagwe." 
Proverbs15:21 Moitlhokišatlhaologanyo o kgahlwa ke tša botlaela, wa tlhaologanyo yena o dira tša go loka." 
Proverbs15:22 Wa go se kgopele maele o palelwa mererong, wa go a kgopela yena o a atlega." 
Proverbs15:23 Go kgahliša bjang go bolela sa maleba ka nako ya gona! 
Proverbs15:24 Mohlale o tšea ka tsela ya go rotošetša bophelong, ya ba ge a phema go theogela bodulabahu." 
Proverbs15:25 Morena o pšhatla magae a baikgogomoši, dithetemotse tša bahlologadi tšona o a di šireletša." 
Proverbs15:26 Morena o šišingwa maanomabe, dipolelo tša leago tšona di a mo kgahla." 
Proverbs15:27 Moikhumišakaboradia o hlolela lapa la gagwe go šekeletšwa, moilatsogolekobong yena o tla phela." 
Proverbs15:28 Moloki o nagana pele a fetola, yo kgopo yena o kgabakgaba tše mpe ka ganong." 
Proverbs15:29 Morena o katologa bakgopo, baloki bona o kwa thapelo tša bona." 
Proverbs15:30 Motho o thabišwa ke go edišetšwa sefahlego; taba tše dibotse di mo tiiša moko. 
Proverbs15:31 Moamogelatsholo o dula le ba bohlale. 
Proverbs15:32 Maganagokgalwa ke moipolai, moamogelatsholo yena o okeletšwa kwešišo." 
Proverbs15:33 Go boifa Morena ke go ithuta bohlale; pele motho a ka hlompšha o swanetše go ikokobetša. 
Proverbs16:1 Motho a ka no ba le maikemišetšo, fela molaodi wa tše di tlago hlaga ke Morena." 
Proverbs16:2 Motho a ka no gopola gore tšohle tše a di dirago di lokile, kganthe yo a elago maikemišetšo ke Morena." 
Proverbs16:3 Gafela Morena tše o di dirago, gomme o tla atlega mererong ya gago." 
Proverbs16:4 Dilo tšohle di na le se Morena a di hloletšego sona, le bakgopo ba hloletšwe tšatši la masetlapelo." 
Proverbs16:5 Morena o šišingwa moikgogomoši, ruri, yo mobjalo a ka se phonyokge kotlo." 
Proverbs16:6 Motho o swarelwa dibe ka go rata Morena le go mmotegela; ka go mmoifa motho o phema bobe. 
Proverbs16:7 Ge motho a phela ka go kgahla Morena, Morena o mo phediša le manaba a gagwe ka khutšo." 
Proverbs16:8 Bonnyane o bo hwetšago ka toka bo phala bontši o bo hwetšago ka boradia. 
Proverbs16:9 Motho a ka itherela boyo, fela ke Morena yo a mo etetšago." 
Proverbs16:10 Kgoši e bolela ka maatla a go tšwa go Modimo; tša gagwe dikahlolo di lokile. 
Proverbs16:11 Morena o nyaka ge go šomišwa kelo ya nnete; ke yena a beago seroto. 
Proverbs16:12 Magoši a šišingwa ditiro tše mpe, gobane toka ke yona e tiišago mmušo." 
Proverbs16:13 Mokgahlakgoši ke mmolelatherešo; moratwakekgoši ke wa polelo tše di lokilego. 
Proverbs16:14 Kgalefo ya kgoši e ka hlola lehu; yo bohlale o a e tima. 
Proverbs16:15 Botho bja kgoši bjona bo a phediša, bo bjalo ka maru, manešapulayatsheola." 
Proverbs16:16 Go huma ka bohlale go phala go huma ka gauta; go ba le kwešišo go phala go ba le silibera. 
Proverbs16:17 Baloki ba phela ka go šikologa bobe; yo a itotago maitshwarong o tla phela. 
Proverbs16:18 Boikgogomošo bo iša motho tahlegong; boikgodišo bo feleletša ka go wiša motho. 
Proverbs16:19 Go ikokobetša le baikokobetši go phala go abelana phahlanahlakola le baikgogomoši. 
Proverbs16:20 Mošetšakeletšo o a atlega; go lehlogonolo yo a tshephago Morena. 
Proverbs16:21 Motho yo bohlale re ra wa kwešišo; mmoledi wa sethakga ke wa go kgodiša batho. 
Proverbs16:22 Tlhaologanyo e kgontšha mohlaologanyi go ipshina ka bophelo; mašilo a bolawa ke bošilo bja ona. 
Proverbs16:23 Yo bohlale o nagana pele a bolela; ka gona polelo ya gagwe e a kgodiša. 
Proverbs16:24 Polelo tše bose di swana le mamapo a dinose – a a natefago ka ganong, gape a fepago mmele." 
Proverbs16:25 Go na le tsela ye e bonalago nke e lokile, fela mafelelong e iša lehung." 
Proverbs16:26 Diyamaleng di hlohleletša mošomi go šoma, gobane o šomišwa ke tlala." 
Proverbs16:27 Senokwane se loga maanomabe; ganong se tshwa polelo tše di fišago boka mollo. 
Proverbs16:28 Moradia o hlola phapano; wa lesebo o lweša bagwera ba go ntšhana sa inong. 
Proverbs16:29 Ntwadumela o goketša batho, a ba tšeiša ka tsela tša go se loke." 
Proverbs16:30 Motho wa go budulala o nagana bomenemene; sepetlamelomo o rera bobe. 
Proverbs16:31 Moriri wo mošweu ke seala, ke moputso wa ba ba phelago ka go loka." 
Proverbs16:32 Motho wa pelotelele o phala mogale; wa go se tshelwe ke pelo o phala wa go thopa motse. 
Proverbs16:33 Batho ba ka no dira matengwa, eupša sephetho se tšewa ke Morena." 
Proverbs17:1 Go ja nthathana ya molatšana o iketlile go phala go ja dimakhura ka lapeng la diphapano. 
Proverbs17:2 Mohlanka yo bohlale o laola ngwanamalešadihlong, ya ba mojabohwa le barwa ba monglapa." 
Proverbs17:3 Silibera e hlwekišwa ka go tološwa ka pitšeng; gauta e hlwekišwa ka go tološwa moubelong, kganthe pelo ya motho yona e hlahlobja ke Morena." 
Proverbs17:4 Modiratšempe o theeletša polelo tše mpe, wa maaka o hlwaela lesebo tsebe." 
Proverbs17:5 Mokweramodiidi o nyefola Mmopi wa gagwe, mothabelamadimabe a mongwe a ka se phonyokge kotlo." 
Proverbs17:6 Ditlogolwana ke diala tša diputswa, barwa le bona ba itheta ka botatabo." 
Proverbs17:7 Polelo ye botse e rona lešilo, maaka le ona a rona mokgomana." 
Proverbs17:8 Tsogolekobong mofi wa lona o re ke pheko, o re le mo kgontšha tše a di dirago." 
Proverbs17:9 Molebalelaphošo ke wa go nyaka kwano; motsošološaphošo yena o lweša bantšhanasainong. 
Proverbs17:10 Monatlhaologanyo o kwa kgalemo, lešilo lona le palela le thupa tše lekgolo." 
Proverbs17:11 Yo kgopo o kgonetše go tsoša mmudubudu, eupša o tla otlwa gasehlogo." 
Proverbs17:12 Go gahlana le bere ye e hlakotšwego bana go phala go gahlana le lešilo le tša bošilo bja lona. 
Proverbs17:13 Yo a lefetšago botse ka bobe, bobe bo ka se tloge ka ga gagwe." 
Proverbs17:14 Go rumolana go swana le go phulela meetse mosele; wena o tloge ntwa e sešo ya thoma. 
Proverbs17:15 Wa go lokafatša yo kgopo le wa go tšwa moloki ba šišimiša Morena ka babedi. 
Proverbs17:16 Go thušang go fa lešilo tšhelete ya go lefela thuto, mola le sa nyake thušo?" 
Proverbs17:17 Mogwera ke yo a go botegelago ka nako tšohle; morwarragomotho o ema naye mathateng. 
Proverbs17:18 Mohlokatlhaologanyo o itlema go lefela motho melato ge mongmelato a palelwa; o ikana go lefela yo a jetšego molato mpeng. 
Proverbs17:19 Yo a ratago go kgopiša batho o rata diphapano; yo a ikgogomošago o a ipolaya. 
Proverbs17:20 Senokwane ga se atlege; mpheane le yena o wela kotsing. 
Proverbs17:21 Motswalasetlatla o rwele bothata; tatagolešilo ga a na lethabo. 
Proverbs17:22 Motho wa go thakgala ke yo a phetšego gabotse; wa go nolega moko yena ga a na maatla. 
Proverbs17:23 Yo kgopo o amogela tsogolekobong gore go menolwe toka. 
Proverbs17:24 Monatlhaologanyo o ikemišetša go dira tša bohlale, lešilo lona ga le na maikemišetšo." 
Proverbs17:25 Ngwana yo e lego setlaela o nyamiša tatagwe, o kweša mmagwe bohloko bjo bogolo." 
Proverbs17:26 Go lefiša mohlokamolato ga se gwa loka; go betha mokgomana ga go a lebana. 
Proverbs17:27 Motsebi ga se wa go balabala, wa go se felafele pelo ke yena wa kwešišo." 
Proverbs17:28 Le lešilo ge le ikhomoletše le ka sengwa yo bohlale; ge le momile molomo go ka thwe le ne tlhaologanyo. 
Proverbs18:1 Tšhikanoši ke wa go nyaka go dira boithatelo, o gana maele ka moka a mabotse." 
Proverbs18:2 Setlatla ga se tshwenyegele go kwešiša ba bangwe, se rata fela go bolela tše se di naganago." 
Proverbs18:3 Bokgopo bo sepela le lenyatšo, tlhomphologo e sepela le kgobogo." 
Proverbs18:4 Polelo ya yo bohlale e ka teba bjalo ka bodiba; e ka ba bjalo ka noka ye e elago, e ka ba mothopo wa bohlale." 
Proverbs18:5 Go emelela monamolato tshekong, e le ge o lahla mohlokamolato, ke phošo." 
Proverbs18:6 Polelo tša setlatla di hlola phapano, di se bakela go itiwa." 
Proverbs18:7 Lešilo le ipolaya ka dipolelo tša lona, le tanywa ka tše le di bolelago." 
Proverbs18:8 Lesebo la mpheane le bose, le etša seakolo se se kwametšwago." 
Proverbs18:9 Motho wa sebodu ke yo mobe, o bjalo ka motšitlanyi." 
Proverbs18:10 Morena o bjalo ka tora ye e tiilego yeo moloki a ka tšhabelago go yona a bolokega. 
Proverbs18:11 Mohumi o bona lehumo la gagwe e le motse wo o ageleditšwego, e le morako wo mogolo wo o mo šireleditšego." 
Proverbs18:12 Go ikgogomoša ke go ikiša tahlegong; ge o nyaka go hlompšha o ikokobetše. 
Proverbs18:13 Yo a arabago a se a kwa potšišo o dira tša bošilo le tša go rumolana. 
Proverbs18:14 Monakgotlelelo ga a fekeetšwe ke bolwetši, eupša ge a nolegile moko a ka swarelela bjang?" 
Proverbs18:15 Monatlhaologanyo o fišegela go tseba; yo bohlale o dula a hlwaetše tša tsebo tsebe.

Proverbs18:17 Mmolelapele tshekong o a kgolwa, go fihlela ge go etla wa go mo sekišiša." 
Proverbs18:18 Taba ya banna ba maatla ba ba lwago ka kgorong ya tsheko e ka ahlolwa ka go direlwa matengwa. 
Proverbs18:19 Ngwanabomotho a kgopišwa, ga a tsenege, o feta le motse wo o ageleditšwego ka go se tsenege, wa fapana naye, o gana poelano." 
Proverbs18:20 Motho a ka iphediša ka tše a di bolelago, a ka ikhweletša dijo ka go ba seboledi." 
Proverbs18:21 Lehu le bophelo di laolwa ke go bolela ga motho; yo a bolelago kudu o tla ikobela. 
Proverbs18:22 Yo a nyetšego mosadi ke yo lehlogonolo, o thabelwa ke Morena." 
Proverbs18:23 Sa modiidi ke go kgopela, fela mohumi a fetole ka sekgapho."

Proverbs19:1 Modiidi yo a hlokago bosodi o phala moradia wa lešilo. 
Proverbs19:2 Mahlahla a mohlokatsebo ga a na mohola; lephakuphaku le a lahletša. 
Proverbs19:3 Motho o itahla ka botlatla bja gagwe, gomme a sole Morena." 
Proverbs19:4 Lehumo le gokela motho bagwera ba bantši; modiidi yena o tšhabelwa ke wa gagwe mogwera. 
Proverbs19:5 Hlatse ya maaka ga e pheme kotlo, ramaaka ga a ke a phonyokga." 
Proverbs19:6 Ba bantši ba leka go ithatiša ba bagolo; yo a sa timanego batho ba ikgweranya naye. 
Proverbs19:7 Modiidi o hloiwa le ke banababo, bagwera ba gagwe le bona ba mo katologa le go feta. Le ge a ithapeletša go bona, ga go thuše selo." 
Proverbs19:8 Moithati o katanela go hwetša bohlale, moitapišetšakwešišo le yena o a atlega." 
Proverbs19:9 Hlatse ya maaka ga e pheme kotlo; ramaaka yena o tla bolawa. 
Proverbs19:10 Go phela ka matsaka go rona lešilo, lekgoba lona ge le laola bakgomana le ronwa le go feta." 
Proverbs19:11 Motho yo bohlale o pelotelele; bothakga bja gagwe ke ge a sa latišiše dikgopi. 
Proverbs19:12 Kgalefo ya kgoši e etša go bopa ga tau, kgaugelo ya gagwe yona nke ke phoka bjanyeng." 
Proverbs19:13 Ngwana yo e lego setlaela o tsenya tatagwe mathateng; mosadi wa go ngamola hlogo ke kgwara bjalo ka meetse a a rothago tlhakeng ya go dutla. 
Proverbs19:14 Lapa le lehumo ke bohwa bja go tšwa go batswadi ba motho, mosadi wa go loka yena o tšwa go Morena." 
Proverbs19:15 Bobodu bo robatša motho boroko bjo bogolo, sebodu se phela se bolawa ke tlala." 
Proverbs19:16 Yo a phethago taelo tša Morena o a itota; yo a sa di šetšego yena o a ipolaya. 
Proverbs19:17 Yo a fago modiidi selo o adima Morena, gomme Morena o tla mo putsa." 
Proverbs19:18 O kgale ngwanagago go sa holofetša, fela o se galefe wa go mmolaya." 
Proverbs19:19 Mofelafelapelo o tla ipona; wa mo hlakodiša gatee, o tla swanela go mo hlakodiša gape." 
Proverbs19:20 Theeletša maele, o eletšege, gore ka moso o be yo bohlale." 
Proverbs19:21 Motho a ka no ikemišetša dilo tše di fapafapanego, fela thato go phethega ya Morena." 
Proverbs19:22 Se se rategago mothong ke lerato la kilaphetogo; go ba ramaaka go phalwa ke go diila. 
Proverbs19:23 Yo a boifago Morena o a atlega; o robala a sa hlobaele, a sa welwe ke madimabe." 
Proverbs19:24 Sebodu se ngwatha bogobe ka mogopong, fela sa tšwafa go iša seatla ka ganong."

Proverbs19:26 Motlaišatatagwe le morakammagwe ke mohlabišadihlong wa manyala. 
Proverbs19:27 Ngwanaka, ge o ka ithiba ditsebe ge o rutwa, o ka se be le tsebo." 
Proverbs19:28 Hlatse ye mpe e menola toka. Yo kgopo o kgabakgaba bokgopo ka ganong.

Proverbs20:2 Kgalefo ya kgoši e swana le go bopa ga tau; yo a mo galefišago o a ipolaya. 
Proverbs20:3 Go se itsenye diphapanong ke go ipha seriti; ke setlaela fela se se ikgalefišago. 
Proverbs20:4 Sebodu ga se leme ka nako ya gona; ka gona, ge se re ke yo buna ga se hwetše selo." 
Proverbs20:5 Menagano ya motho ga e fihlelelwe, e etša meetse ka bodibeng; ke fela wa temogo yo a ka kgonago go mo utolliša yona." 
Proverbs20:6 Ba bantši ba ipitša babotegi, eupša na o gona yo a tlogago a tshephega?" 
Proverbs20:7 Yo a dirago tše di lokilego, mohlokabosodi, bana ba gagwe ba na le mahlatse." 
Proverbs20:8 Kgoši ge a ahlola o hlokola tšohle tše e lego diphošo. 
Proverbs20:9 Na o gona yo a ka rego ga a itshesengwe, o tlošitše dibe tša gagwe?" 
Proverbs20:10 Morena o šišingwa dikelo tša boradia. 
Proverbs20:11 Ngwana o tsebja ka mediro ya gagwe; o ipontšha ka maitshwaro gore o hlwekile, o lokile." 
Proverbs20:12 Tsebe ye e kwago le leihlo le le bonago, ka dipedi di dirilwe ke Morena." 
Proverbs20:13 O se rate boroko, gore o se tlo diila; o tsaroge phoka, o tle o atelwe ke tša go ja." 
Proverbs20:14 Moreki o a galala o re: “Ke llwe! Ke llwe!” Eupša ge a tloga o tšama a itheta ka theko ye a e hweditšego. 
Proverbs20:15 Go tseba se o se bolelago go phala gauta le magakabje a mantši. 
Proverbs20:16 Yo a itlemago go lefela mošele molato ge yena mongmolato a palelwa, a amogwe kobo, e swarwe go fihlela mošele yoo a lefa molato wa gagwe." 
Proverbs20:17 Motho o ipshina ka sejo se a se hweditšego ka boradia, eupša ka morago a kwe nke o ja lekgwara." 
Proverbs20:18 Kgopela maele mererong ya gago, gomme o tla atlega; le ntweng ge o eya o theeletše keletšo tše dibotse." 
Proverbs20:19 Mpheane ga a kgone go uta sephiri; o se ikopanye le difafatlane. 
Proverbs20:20 Yo a rogago tatagwe goba mmagwe o tla bolawa a ba bjalo ka lebone le le timago swiswing. 
Proverbs20:21 Bohwa bo hweditšwego ka lephakuphaku mathomong, mafelelong ga bo atle motho." 
Proverbs20:22 O se ke wa re: “Ke tla itefeletša;” tshepha Morena, mme yena o tla go lamolela." 
Proverbs20:23 Morena o šišingwa dikelo tša boradia; dikelo tša bofora ga se di loke. 
Proverbs20:24 Bophelo bja motho bo laolwa ke Morena; bjale motho a ka kwešiša bjang tše di mo hlagelago? 
Proverbs20:25 Go abela Morena mpho ka lephakuphaku ke go ithea, ge eba ka morago o tla itsholela keno yeo ya gago." 
Proverbs20:26 Kgoši ye bohlale e hlokola bakgopo, ya ba otla e se na lešoko." 
Proverbs20:27 Letswalo la motho ke lebone la Morena, le lekola boteng bja pelo ya motho." 
Proverbs20:28 Kgoši e lotwa ke lerato le potego, pušo ya yona e thekgwa ke toka." 
Proverbs20:29 Boikgantšho bja masogana ke maatla a bona, seala sa diputswa sona ke moriri wo mošweu." 
Proverbs20:30 Kotlo ye bohloko e lahliša motho bobe; thupa e ruta motho maitshwaro a mabotse.

Proverbs21:3 Go phethagatša toka le tshwanelo go kgahla Morena go phala go mo direla dihlabelo. 
Proverbs21:4 Ka mehla bakgopo ba a ikgogomoša, ba a ikgantšha, gomme seo ke sebe." 
Proverbs21:5 Dikakanyo tša motho wa seroto di mo tlišetša mokhora, lepotlapotla lona le boelwa ke bohloki." 
Proverbs21:6 Humo le hwetšwago ka boradia le nyamelela wa phefo, le bea motho kotsing ya lehu."

Proverbs21:10 Yo kgopo o dula a duma go dira tše mpe; ga a na botho. 
Proverbs21:11 Go otlwa ga mokodutli e ba go lemoša mohlokatsebo go tša bophelo. Go ruta yo bohlale ke go mo okeletša tsebo.

Proverbs21:15 Ge go dirwa ka toka moloki o a thaba, kganthe badiratšempe bona ba a tšhoga." 
Proverbs21:16 Yo a se sa dirago tša tlhaologanyo o tla felela bodulabahu. 
Proverbs21:17 Morataboithabišo o dula a diila; moratabeine wa go rata le menyaka le yena ga a hume. 
Proverbs21:18 Bakgopo le ba go se tshephege ba welwa ke madimabe, baloki le batshephegi bona ba a šireletšwa." 
Proverbs21:19 Go iphelela lešokeng go phala go dula le mosadi wa go ngamola hlogo, wa swele." 
Proverbs21:20 Ka lapeng la yo bohlale go letše lehumo le dinkgabose, lešilo lona le senya tšhelete la šala le le fela." 
Proverbs21:21 Yo a phegelelago go dira ka toka le lerato, o tla phela ka boiketlo, o tla swarwa gabotse, a hlomphiwa." 
Proverbs21:22 Molaodi yo bohlale a ka thopa motse wa bagale, a phušola sebo se ba se tshephilego." 
Proverbs21:23 Yo a itotago ge a bolela o phema mathata. 
Proverbs21:24 Mokodutli ke motho wa mereba le boikgogomošo, wa go ikgantšha kudu." 
Proverbs21:25 Motho wa sebodu ke moipolai, ka ge a gana go šoma." 
Proverbs21:26 O hlwela go duma dilo letšatši ka moka; moloki yena o a fa, ga a timane." 
Proverbs21:27 Morena o šišingwa dihlabelo tša bakgopo, gagolo ge ba di dira ka maanomabe."

Proverbs21:29 Moloki o tseba taba tša gagwe, yo kgopo yena ke tsebanyane fela."

Proverbs22:1 Go tuma go phala go huma kudu, go hlomphega go phala silibera le gauta." 
Proverbs22:2 Bahumi le badiidi ba swana ka taba ye: ka moka ba bopilwe ke Morena. 
Proverbs22:3 Yo bohlale o bona kotsi e sa tla gomme a e pheme, mohlokatsebo yena o leba go yona gomme a wele." 
Proverbs22:4 Go ikokobetša le go boifa Morena go tlišetša motho lehumo, le tlhompego, le bophelo." 
Proverbs22:5 Moipabaledi o phema meetlwa le melaba ye e lego tseleng ya yo kgopo. 
Proverbs22:6 Ruta ngwana tsela ya go phela, gomme bophelong bja gagwe ka moka a ka se e lahle." 
Proverbs22:7 Mohumi o laola badiidi, moadingwa ke lekgoba la moadimi." 
Proverbs22:8 Mobjalabokgopo o welwa ke madimabe, ya ba ge batho ba ikhuditše bogale bja gagwe." 
Proverbs22:9 Mafakudu o a šegofatšwa, ka ge dijo tša gagwe a di ngwathelana le bahloki." 
Proverbs22:10 Raka mokweri, kgang e fele, go fele le phapano le tlhomphollo." 
Proverbs22:11 Yo a ratago boloki, wa polelo tša botho, kgoši e tla ba mogwera wa gagwe." 
Proverbs22:12 Morena o šetša gore tsebo e lotolwe; polelo tša ba go se tshephege o a di phuhlamiša. 
Proverbs22:13 Sebodu se re: “Ka ntle go ne tau! Nka bolawa kua mekgotheng!” 
Proverbs22:14 Polelo tša seotswa ke molete wa go iša; yo a galefetšwego ke Morena o wela ka gare ga wona. 
Proverbs22:15 Go seleka ke mokgwa wa ngwana, gomme go kgonwa ke thupa ya tsholo." 
Proverbs22:16 Yo a ikhumišago ka go ja badiidi matsogo, goba a fago bahumi dimpho, o tla diila." 
Proverbs22:17 Hlwaya tsebe o theeletše polelo tša borabohlale; thuto ya ka o e ele hloko. 
Proverbs22:18 Ge o ka di boloka ka pelong, tša dula di le molomong wa gago, o tla ipshina ka tšona." 
Proverbs22:19 Ke ruta wena lehono, gore o phele o botile Morena." 
Proverbs22:20 Ke go ngwaletše diema tše masome a mararo tša go go eletša le go go okeletša tsebo," 
Proverbs22:21 gore o tle o lemoge se se lokilego le se e lego therešo; ke mo e tlago re ge o romilwe wa boa le pego ya nnete. 
Proverbs22:22 O se hlalefetše modiidi ka ge e le modiidi, le mohlaki o se mo tšeatšee kgorong." 
Proverbs22:23 Gobane bona bao tabeng ya bona ba tla bolelelwa ke Morena, bahlakodi le bona Morena o tla ba hlakola bophelo." 
Proverbs22:24 O se gwerane le sefelapelwana; o se sepelelane le motho wa pelwana ye nyennyane," 
Proverbs22:25 ka gore o ka tla wa tlwaela mekgwa ya gagwe, mme wa šitwa ke go e lahla." 
Proverbs22:26 O se itleme go lefela motho molato wa gagwe ge yena a palelwa; o se ikane go lefela motho yo a jetšego molato mpeng," 
Proverbs22:27 ka gore ge o ka šitwa ke go lefa, ba ka go amoga le bolao bja gago, wa šala o robetše fase." 
Proverbs22:28 O se šuthiše mollwane wa gago wa bogologolo wo o tsemilwego ke borakgolokhukhu ba gago. 
Proverbs22:29 Sekgoni sa modiro ke sa go direla magoši, e sego bathofela." 
Proverbs23:1 Ge o eja le mmuši o ele hloko tše di lego pele ga gago. 
Proverbs23:2 O itshware ge o itseba o na le bojelo. 
Proverbs23:3 O se dume dijo tše bose tše a go soletšego tšona; a ka no ba a go theile. 
Proverbs23:4 O be yo bohlale – o se itapišetše lehumo. 
Proverbs23:5 E ka re o sa ikweša lona la go tšwa ka diatleng, mo nkego le metše diphego, la fofela leratadimeng boka ntšhu." 
Proverbs23:6 O se je dijo tša ngame; o se dume dijo tše bose tše a go soletšego tšona," 
Proverbs23:7 gobane o dula a bala tshenyegelo ya gagwe go tšona; o bjalo. Le ge a re: “A re je! A re nwe!” ka pelong ga a realo. 
Proverbs23:8 O tla hlatša le nthathana ye o e llego, gomme mantšu a gago a tebogo a tla be a lobile." 
Proverbs23:9 O se bolele le setlaela taba tše thata, gobane se ka se di kwešiše." 
Proverbs23:10 O se šuthiše mollwane wa gago wa bogologolo, goba wa selela ka tšhemong ya tšhuana." 
Proverbs23:11 Gape Mošireletši wa bona ke yo maatla, gomme tabeng ye ya bona ba tla bolelelwa ke yena." 
Proverbs23:12 Tše o di rutwago o di ele hloko, o hlwaele yo a go rutago tsebo tsebe." 
Proverbs23:13 O se dikadike go kgala ngwana; thupa e ka se mmolaye," 
Proverbs23:14 e tla mo hlakodiša gore a se ye bodulabahu. 
Proverbs23:15 Ngwanaka, ge o ka ba yo bohlale nka thaba kudu." 
Proverbs23:16 Ke tla hlalala ge o bolela tše di lokilego. 
Proverbs23:17 O se ke wa duma badiradibe; wena o dule o boifa Morena. 
Proverbs23:18 Ge go ka ba bjalo, gona bokamoso bja gago bo tla kgahliša, le kholofelo ya gago e ka se be ya lefeela." 
Proverbs23:19 O theeletše, ngwanaka, o be yo bohlale, o sepele tseleng ye e lokilego." 
Proverbs23:20 O se tlwaelane le ditagwa goba dijagobe. 
Proverbs23:21 Ditagwa le dijagobe di tla diila; raboroko o tla apara maratha. 
Proverbs23:22 O theetše tatago yo a go tswetšego, le mmago ge a tšofetše o se mo nyatše." 
Proverbs23:23 O ikhweletše therešo le bohlale le thuto le kwešišo, mme o se ke wa di lahla." 
Proverbs23:24 Tatagongwana wa go loka o hlalala gagolo, motswadi wa ngwana yo bohlale o a mo thabela."
